programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: La directora de la clinica psiquiatrica le dice a Andreina que Anselmo es el responsable de que Helena este asi y este ahi. Luis Enrique le dice a Rosa que sabe que ella esta enamorada de su hermano y le pide que haga todo lo que pueda para estar con el. El detective le dice a Leonardo Alfonso que tiene una pista que lo puede llevar al hijo de Rosa. Anselmo le dice a Santa si no le gustaria unirse con e ante los ojos de Dios y que necesita una mujer como ella. Le propone si quiere ser su novia y luego su esposa. Ada Luz ve a Alma Blanca y tiene miedo que ella hable pero sabe que en el estado que esta no puede hablar.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Andreina amenaza a Anselmo diciendole que sabe que tiene a Helena encerrada en una clinica psiquiatrica. Helena balbucea cosas delante de Patricia. Leonardo Alfonso y Rosa van hablar a colegio de Pedrito. Anselmo quiere saber que es lo que quiere Andreina para que termine con las amenazas. Cuando Andreina le dice todo lo que sabe a Anselmo se pone tan mal que esta a punto de descomponerse porque ella sabe todo sus secretos. Pedrito le dice a Santa que su madre se movio. Anselmo se encierra en su estudio y no quiere ver a nadie mas no sabe que hacer con Andreina.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Leonardo Alfonso le dice a Rosa que esta enamorado de ella, la besa y le dice que la ama. Pero llega Luis Enrique y los ve asi que para disimular Luis Enrique le pega una pina a su hermano. Felisberto se roba las tarjetas de su padre para poder recuperar el dinero que su padre no le quiere dar. Leonardo Alfonso le confiesa a su hermano que el esta enamorado de Rosa. Las esposas de Felisberto le dicen a Inocencia que su novio le fue infiel con ellas. El turco contrata mariachis para que le vayan a cantar a Inocencia a la mansion. Rosa va a ver a Ruiz para contarle que su madre tuvo algunas mejoras.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Rosa junto a Pedrito y Leonardo Alfonso le cantan el cumpleanos a Asdrubal el hijo de Rosa. Ellos tres estan cada vez mas juntos. Sofia junto a Andreina van a ver a Anselmo con el contrato del centro comercial para que lo firme. Lo que ve a groso modo es que Sofia se lleva el 50% de las ganancias y pide quedarse a solas con Andreina para hablar. Santa va a ver a su cirujano plastico para pedirle que la deje 0 km con su inocencia perdida. Reinaldo habla con Patricia de Enzo y le pregunta por que le tiene miedo. Inocencia le dice a Felisberto que lo abandona porque le esta siendo infiel con sus esposas.

programme.title: De Todas Maneras Rosa
programme.desc: Rosa le cuenta la verdad sobre los retratos de sus antepasados a Luis Enrique y Pedrito. Ruiz descubre que el novio de Rosa es homosexual y esta enganando a Rosa. Leonardo Alfonso obliga a la rata a que le cuente todo lo que sabe sobre el robo del hijo de Rosa. Reinaldo entra en la carcel para ver al amigo de Enzo. Claudia le confiesa a Felisberto que le monto un trabajo para quedarse con e. Entregan los resultados de ADN de Anselmo y Pedrito en la mansion y los recibe Ada Luz. La policia se lleva detenido a la rata. Reinaldo busca en la carcel a Esteban de Jesus Contreras quiere saber que relacion tiene con Patricia.

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucia
programme.desc: Lucia se encuentra inconsciente en la ambulancia y va escoltada en la misma por el teniente Rincon que amenaza al medico para que la haga reaccionar. Miguel termina de arreglar la camioneta de su mejor cliente y se dispone a entregarsela. Lucia recobra la conciencia y cuando se da cuenta que esta siendo vigilada por el teniente comienza a luchar con el para sacarle el arma, pero en la confusion se dispara un tiro que hiere al chofer de la ambulancia y la misma termina volcando y Lucia huyendo. Cuando finalmente Miguel esta por entregar la camioneta se da cuenta que en el asiento de atras hay una mujer herida y decide llevarla al hospital. Bonny la esposa de Miguel desesperada llama a su amado para saber que es lo que paso que aun no entrego el carro,

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucia
programme.desc: Miguel decide comprarle ropa a Lucia, mientras realizaba las compras recibe una llamada que le comunicaba que su novia Bonny habia sido secuestrada y para que salga con vida debia entregar a Lucia junto con el bolso, sin saber que hacer, regresa al hotel y ambos se dirigen al taller con la intencion de entregarla, sin embargo al llegar se arrepienten y juntos planean una estrategia para sacar a Bonny del lugar, es asi como entran por una entrada secreta y entre golpes y corridas logran salir los tres en uno de los autos atropellando al cabo Segura pero solo le han ocasionado fracturas.

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucia
programme.desc: Lucia y Miguel han regresado al lugar del ultimo recuerdo de Lucia, aquel donde se ha tirado por el ventanal, alli comienza a darse cuenta que ese lugar ya lo conocia y encuentra cosas que no tenia idea que estaba ahi, solo porque ya lo sabia, es ahi que los interceptan Rincon y Salve, comienza una persecucion pero logran escapar escondiendose en un auto guardado en un estacionamiento hace meses, Miguel y Lucia cuentan con la llave de ese auto pero no tienen conocimiento de quien es el dueno del mismo, es asi que luego de la persecucion comienzan a buscar dentro del auto y encuentran papeles a nombre de un hombre al que no conocian.

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucia
programme.desc: Lucia y Miguel llegan a la direccion que han encontrado en el auto y entran al lugar, comienzan a preguntar por Menesio, es ahi cuando el guardia del burdel se acerca a su jefe advirtiendole que Lucia lo esta buscando, este sin pensarlo llama automaticamente a Armenio para que sus hombres vengan a buscarla, mientras tanto Lucia seguia preguntando a todo aquel que caminaba si alguno la conocia, sin respuestas comienza a charlar con Miguel sobre sus vidas, ahi aparece una joven que trabajaba en el lugar llamada Giselle, al reconocerla la saluda pero Lucia no conocia quien era, al contarle sobre su accidente Giselle le da algunos datos sobre aquellos que podrian decirle y ayudarla a recordar mas cosas aun.

programme.title: Los Secreto de Lucia
programme.desc: Cardenas le cuenta a Rincon que encontraron el cadaver de Guillermo Lopez Mesa. A Lucia le llega un mensaje al celular donde la citan en la Concordia. Miguel le dice a Bonny que busque que es la Concordia, pero ella no encuentra nada. De repente, Lucia recuerda que la Concordia es un barco. Miguel acompana a Lucia al puerto para buscar el barco, aunque Bonny le ruega que no lo haga. Mientras Cardenas esta analizando la camioneta donde encontraron el cadaver de Guillermo Lopez Mesa junto a Rincon, Don Arsenio lo llama a Harold y le avisa que Lucia va a estar en la Concordia, pidiendole que esta vez no la deje escapar.

programme.title: Torrente
programme.desc: Maruja entra justo cuando Valeria esta por decirle a Ana Julia la verdad sobre lo ocurrido despues de su accidente. Se niega a hablar delante de Maruja pero finalmente, poniendo como condicion para hacerlo el irse a otro lugar donde no pueda oirla Reinaldo, les cuenta a ambas lo que se supone es la verdad. Sin embargo no lo hace, entre llanto y pretendido sufrimiento por la situacion, cuenta la historia de cuanto sufrio al enterarse de la muerte de Ana Julia y como finalmente perdio el bebe de Ana Julia que llevaba en su vientre. Maruja se sorprende mas y mas al escuchar la historia y enterarse por Valeria y Ana Julia de todo el asunto del prestamo del vientre y les recrimina haberselo ocultado a Reinaldo.

programme.title: Torrente
programme.desc: Ana Julia y Reinaldo estan muy sorprendidos porque recibieron, por separado, la noticia de que al recuperar ella su identidad ambos volverian a estar casados y el matrimonio de Reinaldo con Valeria quedaria anulado. A Cayo le cuesta creer que Andresito sea su nieto y se retira muy apurado sin conocer a Chari con la excusa de su reunion. Antes de hacerlo le pregunta a Sebastian respecto a cuanto sabe su esposa Paola de la situacion a lo que el responde que pronto va a contarselo y sin importar su reaccion el va a seguir viendo a su hijo. Mientras tanto Chari y Margarita recorren la casa de los Gabaldon asombradas por su esplendor y se encuentran con Martina. Ella les da la bienvenida y le dice a Chari que su rostro le resulta familiar por una foto que Sebastian tiene en su computadora.

programme.title: Rakhi Aur Hathkadi
programme.desc: Thakur Virendra Singh leads a rich life with his wife, Ratna and two sons, Prakash and Suraj. Ratna doesn't approve Suraj's lover, Shobhna because she's poor. However, when Prakash falls in love with Ratna, she approves her unaware of her reality.

programme.title: Bahurani
programme.desc: Amit wants to marry a modern, independent, strong woman, but his parents get him married to a simple village girl, Madhuri. Amit refuses to see or accept her, prompting Madhuri to change her outer appearance and reenter Amit's life as Malathi.

programme.title: Dil Pardesi Ho Gayaa
programme.desc: This story of love across the border follows an Indian boy Arjun (Kapil Jhaveri) on a mission to rescue his brother, Major Ram (Ashutosh Rana) held captive by the Pakistani army. He chances upon a beautiful Pakistani girl named Rukhsar (Saloni Aswani) during the operation and both fall in love with each other. But their love and loyalties put them at a risk of being called traitors by their respective nations.

programme.title: Love Ke Liye Kuch Bhi Karega
programme.desc: Prakash marries the daughter of a rich businessman but his father-in-law disapproves of him. For his approval, Prakash plans his wife’s fake kidnapping and her eventual rescue. But the plan goes awry when some real kidnappers enter the picture.

programme.title: Judwaa
programme.desc: Judwaa is a story about twins Raja and Prem Malhotra who separate at birth. Years later, they reunite to defeat Ratanlal, a local gangster, who wants to destroy the Malhotra family.

programme.title: Fun2shh... Dudes in the 10th Century
programme.desc: Three men Vikram, Ajay and John D'Souza are accused of stealing the crown of Emperor Babushah and, whilst on the run, they are transported back to the 10th century. Now they must not only prove their innocence but also return to the 21st century.

programme.title: I M 24
programme.desc: I M 24 is the story of a middle-aged man who lies to a wannabe beauty queen about his age and appearance while chatting on an online portal. Watch what happens when the girl decides to pay a personal visit to her online friend.

programme.title: Geet
programme.desc: A renowned singer, Neha (Divya Bharti), loses her ability to sing after being poisoned by her former manager. However, a commoner Rajesh (Avinash Wadhavan) who has been an admirer of Neha’s voice feels determined to help her get better. Does he succeed in getting the singer back on stage?

programme.title: Sangdil Sanam
programme.desc: Kailash Nath, an honest bank manager, befriends his bank's watchman Shankar and even arranges the marriage of his son with Shankar's daughter. But things take a drastic turn when Kailash gets framed in a bank robbery and is sent to prison by Shankar.

programme.title: Filthy Guy
programme.desc: Sammo Hung is a poor village orphan called 'Filthy Guy' for his unwashed / diseased head whose ambitious landlord's son becomes king and wants to kill him as a prophecy predicts Sammo Hung will replace him. Eventually Sammo Hung becomes the first Ming Emperor. - Subscribe to the Wu Tang Collection now and enjoy the best in Martial Arts Action and Entertainment!

programme.title: Great Chinese Boxer
programme.desc: Superb film depicting the exploits of famed Chinese boxer Ho Yuan Chia, the founder of the Ching Wu kung fu system.

programme.title: Blade Of Doom
programme.desc: A roving swordsman known as Snowy White has in his possession the much sought after 13 Moon Sword. Anyone who manages to defeat him in combat may own the sword and take a high position in the martial world. Chen Sing at his very best.

programme.title: Crazy Horse Intelligent Monkey
programme.desc: The story could be "Guards of a casino beat Hou Hsian-Shan because he was caught cheating. Fortunately, kung fu expert Ma Ta rescues him" but the film is so much fun it really doesn't matter. .

programme.title: Filthy Guy
programme.desc: Sammo Hung is a poor village orphan called 'Filthy Guy' for his unwashed / diseased head whose ambitious landlord's son becomes king and wants to kill him as a prophecy predicts Sammo Hung will replace him. Eventually Sammo Hung becomes the first Ming Emperor. - Subscribe to the Wu Tang Collection now and enjoy the best in Martial Arts Action and Entertainment!

programme.title: Great Chinese Boxer
programme.desc: Superb film depicting the exploits of famed Chinese boxer Ho Yuan Chia, the founder of the Ching Wu kung fu system.

programme.title: The Eunuch Of The Western Palace
programme.desc: Of all the political factions in China, the most power-hungry is the feared Wang, a Eunuch that will stop at nothing to gain control of the throne. Action ensues when a group of brave expert fighters deliver damning evidence against him.

programme.title: Dragon Blood
programme.desc: Liu travels to the USA from China in search of his relatives and the hopes of finding a peaceful life. However, he has in his possession a sacred dragon medallion that was taken from the Qing court. An assassin from the Qing is sent after him, and soon he discovers that life in the Wild West is no fun at all.

programme.title: Dynamite Trio
programme.desc: The most deadly fighter on earth, a man so dangerous in combat he only uses one hand, and he’s after the greatest book ever written. This book, a tutorial in the "mantis fist", must be protected by an unlikely band of heroes.

programme.title: Ecstasy Of Order: The Tetris Master
programme.desc: Tetris. We've all played it, rotating the pieces and dropping them in the perfect place, or despairing as we discover a piece won't fit. But what about the people who've truly mastered Tetris? Where are the Kasparovs and Fischers, the great champions who've dedicated their minds to solving its deepest puzzles? Ecstasy of Order tracks down just such a group of record- holding Tetris Masters as they prepare to compete in the 2010 Classic Tetris World Championship. Directed by Adam Cornelius.

programme.title: The Emoji Story - Censored
programme.desc: Emojis are a worldwide phenomenon, with some arguing that these smiling poops and heart-eyed faces are on the verge of actually becoming their own language. Who, if anyone, is in charge of this new global digital language? Directed by Ian Cheney and Martha Shane.

programme.title: Disaster Playground
programme.desc: Hollywood relies on Bruce Willis to save the world in Armageddon, but who are the real-life heroes seeking to save our civilization from the next major asteroid impact? Disaster Playground investigates future outer space catastrophes and the procedures to manage and assess the risks, following the scientists planning the monitoring and deflection of hazardous Near Earth Objects and the real-life procedures in place in the event of an asteroid collision with the earth. Directed by Nelly Ben Hayoun.

programme.title: Deprogrammed
programme.desc: DEPROGRAMMED chronicles Ted 'Black Lightning' Patrick's anti-cult crusade. His practice of deprogramming, also known as “reverse brainwashing,” quickly snowballed into a vast underground movement composed of concerned parents, ex-cultists, and sympathetic law-enforcers whose mission was to physically and mentally remove individuals from cults. Some of the people he's saved, however, wonder if his services cause more harm than good. Directed by Mia Donovan.

programme.title: Blood, Sweat and Beer
programme.desc: Blood, Sweat, and Beer follows a trio of 23-year-olds as they struggle to start The Brew Gentlemen Beer Co. in Braddock, PA., a once-prosperous steel town hoping to bounce back from decades of neglect, violence, and population loss. The film also follows Danny Robinson, a boardwalk brewery owner whose business is threatened by an aggressive trademark lawsuit that could leave him bankrupt. Directed by Chip Hiden and Alexis Irvin.

programme.title: The Rocket On The Roof
programme.desc: Curiosity gets the best of a man trying to solve the mystery of a rocket curiously perched on a nearby roof. Directed by Ryan Maxey and Josh Polon.

programme.title: Strike
programme.desc: Bill Fong is passionate about bowling. One seeming ordinary night all may change for this underdog as Fong begins to get strike after strike, nearing the ever elusive 'perfect series.' Directed by Joey Daoud.

programme.title: Caffeinated
programme.desc: Learn the story behind your morning Joe. From seed to mug, coffee, and the process by which it is created, has shaped the lives of thousands of individuals worldwide. Caffeinated gives the coffee consumer unprecedented access to the farmers responsible for growing that perfect bean, and the roasters and baristas responsible for brewing that perfect cup. Directed by Vishal Solanki.

programme.title: After Antarctica
programme.desc: After Antarctica follows legendary polar explorer Will Steger’s journey as an eyewitness to the greatest changes to the polar regions of our planet. Now, thirty years after his historic expedition across the coldest continent on Earth, Steger heads out on the ice once again, at a time when he is not only known for being the first in history to complete these historic feats - he is also the last. Directed by Tasha Van Zandt.

programme.title: Cherry Pop: The Story Of The World's Fanciest Cat
programme.desc: Cherry Pop was no ordinary cat. Beloved by her wealthy socialite owners, she lived life in the lap of luxury. This delightful story will tickle your funny bone and touch your heart. Directed by Kareem Tabsch.

programme.title: Dolphin Lover
programme.desc: Dolphin Lover is a critically acclaimed, award winning short documentary on the incredible true story of Malcolm Brenner and his summer long love affair with Dolly the dolphin. Directed by Joey Daoud and Kareem Tabsch.

programme.title: Down Again - Censored
programme.desc: DOWN AGAIN is an examination of the connection between mental illness and creativity told through the lens of photographer and Chimaira frontman Mark Hunter, exploring the catharsis of making music and how the art affects the fans.

programme.title: Eleanor Ambos Interiors
programme.desc: As a celebrated interior designer loses her eyesight to macular degeneration, she begins to see her life's work in a new light. This eccentric renegade topples ageist stereotypes as she grapples with the limitations of her aging body. Directed by Katrina Sorrentino and Andrew Ellis.

programme.title: A Fat Wreck: The Punk-u-mentary
programme.desc: Fat Wreck Chords... The influential music label proud to say they’ve spent the past 25 years “ruining punk rock”. A Fat Wreck tells the story of founders Fat Mike (of the legendary punk band NOFX) and his ex-wife Erin Kelly-Burkett, spanning the birth, growth, struggles, and survival of the Fat Wreck Chords label. Half inspirational story of chosen family and community, half debauchery and occasionally involuntary drug use... A Fat Wreck blazes exciting new ground in the cinematic genre of puppet-driven punk rock music documentary filmmaking. If you only see one film featuring a dominatrix spanking a puppet in your lifetime... Make it A Fat Wreck! Directed by Shaun M. Colón.

programme.title: Elder
programme.desc: A Mormon missionary finds his world turned upside down when he falls in love with a handsome, Italian Communist. With original 8mm film Tom Clark recounts a love story on the coast of Italy. Directed by Genéa Gaudet.

programme.title: Muxes
programme.desc: In the southern state of Oaxaca where, in the indigenous communities around the town of Juchitán, the world is not divided simply into males and females. The local Zapotec people have made room for a third category, which they call “muxes” - men who consider themselves women and live in a socially sanctioned limbo between the two genders. Directed by Ivan Olita.

programme.title: Jonah
programme.desc: An interview with a formerly enslaved African American man accompanies a powerful modern day dance vignette. The juxtaposition of past and present raises questions about inherited trauma and the possibility of regeneration. Directed by Andrew Michael Ellis.

programme.title: We Are Oscar Mike
programme.desc: Through his non-profit foundation, Oscar Mike, Noah helps rehabilitate other veterans through the adaptive sports that saved his own life. Directed by Nick Cavalier.

programme.title: Life In Miniature
programme.desc: Kath Holden is an artist of the everyday. Inspired by the world around her, Kath's creations are whimsical yet keenly observed, and a far cry from the genteel museum pieces that her contemporaries are producing. A proud Yorkshire woman, Kath reflects on her life and art as she carves a place for herself in the precious world of miniatures. Directed by Ellen Evans.

45365 explores the congruities of daily life in an American town. From the patrol car to the courtroom, the playground to the nursing home, the parade to the prayer service, it explores relationships and interactions - with people and their environment. The stories of a father and son, a young relationship, cops and criminals, officials and their electorate coalesce into a mosaic of faces, places, and events. 45365 is a portrait of a city and its people. Directed by Turner Ross and Bill Ross IV.

programme.title: The Hobby
programme.desc: A McDonald’s Happy Meal shortage. A security guard escort. Guns pulled in a Target parking lot. All of these are caused by a common factor: trading cards. In 2020, a new BOOM began. For the first time, large hedge funds, celebrities like Logan Paul and Steve Aoki, nostalgic millennials, entrepreneurs like Josh Luber, and billionaires scrambled to add sports, Pokémon, and other hot item cards to their collections and portfolios. Over the next two years, the hobby exploded — even causing card grading services to shut down due to overwhelming customer service. This documentary is a character-driven feel good deep dive into the high-stakes, eccentric world of card collecting, following buyers, sellers, card shop owners, graders, online streamers, auctioneers, and more, who all participate in the hobby in their own unique ways. Directed by Morgan Jon Fox.

programme.title: Ninety-five Senses
programme.desc: Narrated by Tim Blake Nelson, this is an ode to the body's five senses delivered by a man with little time left to enjoy them. An Oscar nominated DOCUMENTARY+ Original. Directed by Jared and Jerusha Hess.

programme.title: Ninety-five Senses Block
programme.desc: Narrated by Tim Blake Nelson, this is an ode to the body's five senses delivered by a man with little time left to enjoy them. An Oscar nominated DOCUMENTARY+ Original. Directed by Jared and Jerusha Hess.

programme.title: Girls Section
programme.desc: In remote North Pakistan, a quiet revolution is growing. For the first time, girls in the region are challenging tradition for their right to go to school. Directed by Kathryn Everett.

programme.title: In My Own Words
programme.sub-title: In My Own Words: Little Big
programme.desc: DOCUMENTARY+ invited Ilya Prusikin to share their personal story. Ilya is a musician, songwriter, and lead vocalist of the Russian pop-rave superband, Little Big. Ilya recounts the on the ground events of February 24th, the day Russia invaded Ukraine, the group's journey to seek political asylum in the United States, and navigating being labeled a traitor by the Russian government for being outspoken against the war. Directed by Yasir Masood.

programme.title: In My Own Words
programme.sub-title: In My Own Words: Rannel Ngumuya
programme.desc: DOCUMENTARY+ invited Rannel Ngumuya to share a personal story. Rannel Ngumuya is a graphic designer, artist, NFT entrepreneur, and founder of breakout band Bungalo Boy, whose artistic endeavors helped him break through barriers as a first generation immigrant and DACA recipient. Directed by Victor Kamwendo & Yasir Masood.

45365 explores the congruities of daily life in an American town. From the patrol car to the courtroom, the playground to the nursing home, the parade to the prayer service, it explores relationships and interactions - with people and their environment. The stories of a father and son, a young relationship, cops and criminals, officials and their electorate coalesce into a mosaic of faces, places, and events. 45365 is a portrait of a city and its people. Directed by Turner Ross and Bill Ross IV.

programme.title: David Bowie: Stardust
programme.desc: This documentary tells the story of how Bowie became one of the most iconic creations in the history of pop music. From his music, the fashion and the theatrical stage presents which turned Bowie into the biggest craze since the Beatles. Directed by Elena Carmen and Billy Simpson.

programme.title: Elder
programme.desc: A Mormon missionary finds his world turned upside down when he falls in love with a handsome, Italian Communist. With original 8mm film Tom Clark recounts a love story on the coast of Italy. Directed by Genéa Gaudet.

programme.title: Assignment
programme.desc: Kathleen (Kat) Jacobs, a renowned conflict journalist returns home to Johannesburg after her assignment is cut short by a near fatal incident in the Congo. Her mission, while incomplete, is still a success; she discovers an incredible scoop. When Kat pitches the story to her editor, he turns her down - a rather strange decision for a man always on the hunt for a great story. However, she is determined to forge ahead; a decision that pitches her squarely against major political forces. When she declines to back off and keeps pushing ahead after numerous "notices", Kat suddenly finds herself on the run, aided only by her two ex's; ex-husband and an ex-military consultant. What ensues is the most dangerous cat-and-mouse chase of Kat's life. Not only her career and reputation are on the line, but also her life and her family's as well.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A woman accuses a former friend of fake pregnancies.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.sub-title: No More Mooching: I’ve Been Laid Off!

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: You hear about scams all the time - e-mails and voicemails claiming you have won valuable prizes. Dr. Phil is outraged by what some scammers are doing to him, his family and his viewers. One website offers a Dr. Phil quiz to win $5,000 every hour, another says it has the official Dr. Phil personality test, but even more shocking are 800 numbers that take callers' money for the promise of over the phone therapy with Dr. Phil and Robin. But these 800 numbers connect innocent victims with con artists posing as Dr. Phil staff members. The fake staffers ask anywhere from $375 to $1,000 for consultation time that obviously never takes place.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The drama continues as Dr. Phil goes on the hunt for con artists who cheat viewers out of thousands of dollars by posing as him and Robin.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Backstabbing takes many forms - lying, spreading gossip and fueling nasty rumors. Dr. Phil's guests say the ultimate betrayal didn't come from a stranger, but from their own sister!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Deborah was devastated when she went through her 17-year-old daughter, Miranda’s, cell phone and discovered a very disturbing photo. Miranda says she tried to tell her mom about her pregnancy but couldn’t bring herself to do it. Learn why Deborah says she was forced to turn her daughter in to the police, and how Miranda ended up in jail. Dr. Phil reaches out to the teen struggling to deal with guilt and loss, who faces backlash from a community she says doesn’t understand. Then, a family is torn apart after the father confesses the secret he’s kept for years. Find out why his girlfriend is now afraid for their 2-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Officers struggle with an angry man after he kicks out a patrol car window. A relationship ends when a woman takes a bite out of her boyfriend. An upset wife stabs her husband and he ends up in handcuffs. A woman is happy to celebrate her birthday by going to jail.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A code red call blares after a fight occurs in the jail’s dorms. Accused of trespassing, a woman removes her clothes from her holding cell. A man is brought into detox after slamming against a cop car.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man attacks a medical officer and officers rush to intervene. After destroying a tree and unleashing pigeons, a woman is arrested. Unease is caused by a man’s menacing glare during his booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman who says she’s called “Sunshine” has less than a sunny disposition. A man ditches a halfway house for jail to get his life in order. A career criminal shows no regret for his “thug life.” Tense moments in Booking as officers and medical staff try to save a young man from a drug overdose.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Over the course of a single shift, officers are forced to go toe to toe with a hotheaded inmate refusing to change cells without a fight and then must deal with the whims of a homeless man who demands room service and an upgraded jail cell.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A woman is brought in for attacking her boyfriend. A talkative inmate is moved to isolation, and an daring inmate attempts to escape his restraints.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A man attempts to eat marijuana in jail. The Special Detention Unit investigates forbidden letters hidden amongst inmates. A bloody, vicious brawl escalates between an imprisoned duo.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A brawl breaks out between inmates during a routine jail breakfast. An inmate alters their uniform in provocative and outlandish ways. Concerns abound as one-man issues violent threats at deputies.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Officers conduct a strip search after an inmate is accused of carrying contraband. A repeat offender dances for deputies and fellow inmates. High on meth, a man acts erratically during booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: A violent ruckus ensues after a man is placed in jail. Secret prison communication methods are explored and examined. Later, deputies cautiously extract a disruptive man while his wife is held nearby.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Tequila is to blame when a man's behavior gets him locked up. A woman tries to sell drugs online. A detainee in holding for a DUI is of the opinion that he’s been jailed for driving too slow.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: Two sisters go on a mini-crime spree, get caught and find no one will bail them out. A domestic argument about night fishing lands a husband in jail for breaking into his own car. An irate inmate blows off steam by doing laps in her jail cell. A woman finds out it’s hard to stop selling drugs when the neighborhood knows her business.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: In Salt Lake City, UT a man is sent to a holding cell after hurling racial insults. In Reno, NV A man outfitted in just his underwear is taken into custody for battery of a police officer. In Portland, OR an intoxicated eldery man breaks into song during booking.

programme.title: Jail
programme.desc: An agitated man is overly concerned about his 30K watch. cries when he has blood drawn. An inebriated woman threatens her arresting officers with bodily harm, and a woman has no recollection of her arrest.

programme.desc: Interviews with the cast and filmmakers of "Imaginary", "The Neon Highway", "Red Right Hand", "Lola", "American Star", and "Popular Theory".

programme.title: Made in Hollywood

programme.title: Reel Revolution: Women at the Helm
programme.desc: Interviews with the female directors of "Barbie", "Sitting in Bars with Cake", "Cocaine Bear", "Past Lives", "Flamin' Hot", and "Are You There God? It's Me, Margaret.".

programme.title: Made in Hollywood
programme.sub-title: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Interviews with the cast and filmmakers of "Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes", "Poolman", "Tarot", "Turtles All the Way Down", and Breathe".

programme.title: Moviefone TV
programme.desc: Interviews with the cast and filmmakers of "Reagan", "Borderlands", "Sunny", "Rob Peace", "#AMFAD: All My Friends Are Dead", and "Dandelion".

programme.title: Family Movie Night Special
programme.desc: Interviews with the cast and filmmakers of "Harold and the Purple Crayon", "Saving Bikini Bottom: The Sandy Cheeks Movie", "Inside Out 2", "Descendants: The Rise of Red", and "The Spiderwick Chronicles".

programme.title: Made in Hollywood TEEN
programme.desc: Interviews and career advice from some of today’s top documentary filmmakers.

programme.title: Made in Hollywood
programme.desc: Interviews with the cast and filmmakers of "Conclave", "Don't Move", "Before", "The Lincoln Lawyer", and "Exhibiting Forgiveness".

programme.title: Moviefone TV
programme.sub-title: Rings of Power / Tell Me Lies
programme.desc: Interviews with the cast and filmmakers of "The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power", "Saving Bikini Bottom: The Sandy Cheeks Movie", "The Girl in the Pool", "Tell Me Lies" and "Continue".

programme.title: Made in Hollywood
programme.desc: Interviews with the actors and directors of "Rumours", "Anora", "Brothers", "Piece by Piece", and "Goodrich".

programme.title: Moviefone TV
programme.desc: Interviews with the cast and filmmakers of "It's What's Inside", "Sweetpea", "The 4:30 Movie", "White Bird", "Mafia Wars" and "Place of Bones".

programme.title: Made in Hollywood
programme.desc: Interviews with the cast and filmmakers of "Never Let Go", "His Three Daughters", "Emily in Paris", "My Old Ass", and "Little Brother".

programme.title: Made in Hollywood
programme.desc: Interviews with the cast and filmmakers of "Speak No Evil", "The Killer's Game", "The Chicken Sisters", and "Three Women".

programme.title: Moviefone TV
programme.desc: Interviews with the cast and filmmakers of "Boy Kills World", "Humane", "We Grown Now", "Sweet Dreams", "Renegade Nell", and "Arcadian".

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: When it comes to America, we all know who the founding Fathers are, and what their vision was for this Nation. When it comes to Hot Rodding, a lot of people have no idea who the founders are, and how this all got started. Today on GEARZ, Stacey gives you an up-close and personal look at the legendary, “Speedy” Bill Smith and the incredible world of Speedway Motors. Not only were they there from the beginning in the early ‘50’s, but they are still on the cutting edge and pulse of the Hot Rodding world. How do they do it???? You’ll have to watch and find out! After that, Stacey takes a look at the wild ’68 Camaro that Cherry Bomb has put together, to serve as their new way to disturb the Peace. CRANK IT UP!!!!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: It’s back! It’s done!! AND it’s WILD! The Banshee comes full circle as Stacey walks you thru the complete buildup of this incredible V8 powered Miata, and then takes it out for a good flogging! If you’ve ever dreamed of owning a Cobra or Corvette, but you needed something more reliable and affordable, this is one project you have to check out! If you’ve always considered the Mazda Miata a girl’s car…you HAVE to check this out! If you think that it’s impossible to have a reliable car with power windows, Air conditioning, and a real working top, that is ALSO blisteringly FAST…YOU HAVE TO CHECK THIS OUT! The best part is this is a car you can actually build and afford…and that’s what real Hot Rodding is all about!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey rolls the Ram 1500 Express back in the shop and starts to transform it into the Drag’N’ Wagon. Pulling on the legacy of the iconic Superbee, the Little Red Wagon wheelstander, and the current popularity of Dragon folklore, Stacey sets out to create a modern street machine from a lowly base pickup that anybody can afford. To get the rig to handle, a state-of-the-art air suspension is installed, along with massive brakes, and cool performance wheels and tires. One thing about this wagon…..it’s going to handle!!!! After that, it’s off to the dyno to see what kind of difference a spark plug can make in the performance of your engine.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey rolls in an old ’67 Ford pickup that has been hacked on over the years, and shows how to get rid of the old afterthought floor shifter, and convert it to a column shift that will actually shift gears! After that, Stacey digs into one of the newest fuel injection units on the market and shows how easy it is to install, and then demonstrates how to shave the drip rail off of your muscle car. Finally, we answer the question: Is it possible to put chrome plating on aluminum or stainless steel? We take a trip to Advance plating in Nashville to find out. There’s so much stuff going on, you’re gonna need to watch this show twice!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.sub-title: Breathing Fire into the Drag’N’Wagon – The New Face of Slot Cars/Carrera
programme.desc: Today on GEARZ, Stacey brings back the Drag’N’Wagon to see if he can get the beast to breathe some fire! The first thing he puts on is an ATI supercharger system to get some air sucking in. Then adds some hotter coils to help light the flame…and finally slaps on a bigger exhaust system to help blow the air out. If you are wondering how to make a street beast out of an entry level truck, this show spells it out. Then it’s on to the world of slot cars, as Stacey explores the past, present, and future of the little motorized miniatures that helped shape the gearhead world as we know it and introduces you to Carrera slot cars.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.sub-title: Super Cars, Kit Cars, and the SL-C
programme.desc: Today on GEARZ, Stacey jumps into a project that’s bound to get everybody talking…a SUPERCAR that will run with the Ferraris and Lamborghinis that are out there. But, before he can show you HOW to build one, he has to show you how the whole supercar thing came into existence, and what it takes to build something that will run over 200mph…safely! If you’ve ever dreamed of owning a super car, and thought you couldn’t afford it…… this is a show you can’t afford to miss!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Quick…what is the first thing that comes to mine when I say, “kit Car”? Well, if It’s images of cheap poorly fitting bodies, bad engineering, and goofy looking cars, you are about to have your mind changed as Stacey continues building a true supercar, from a Kit, that’ll run over 200Mph! From assembling the chassis to installing the body, this show goes into the nuts and bolts of what it takes to hand-build a car in your garage, that will rival the best that the European Exotics have to offer. Only in America, and only on GEARZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.sub-title: Build Your Own LS7 & Setting Up a Mid-Engine Drivetrain
programme.desc: If you have ever dreamed of walking into a place like GM, and building your own engine using all their tools and equipment, you have to catch this episode of GEARZ, because that is exactly what Stacey does! With GM’s new build-your-own-crate-engine program, you are able to follow Stacey thru the process of building your own LS7 engine. Not only does it give you a great look at how these engines are built and manufactured, but it’ll also give you great incentive to get to GM and build your own! After that, Stacey goes thru the mysterious world of the transaxle, and how to set up a mid-engine car for mind-blowing performance. If you are not watching GEARZ, you’re missing out on a lot of things you haven’t seen before!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.sub-title: Boosting the Ford EcoBoost & Buffing Paint
programme.desc: One of the hottest new rigs on the market is the Ford F150 with the new 6 cylinder eco-boost engine. But is it all it can be? Well, today on GEARZ Stacey takes a new eco-boost powered Ford and shows you some simple upgrades that can boost performance AND fuel economy of this great new engine…..at a price you can afford. Then Stacey rolls in the nastiest, grungiest, barn-find Mustang that you can imagine and shows you the steps and tools required to buff an old nasty paint job back to life. Did we mention that this paint is BLACK!?! All to prove the point that if it can be done with a black car...it can be done with any car…and GEARZ is the show that shows you how to do it!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: With all the makeovers going on these days, it may surprise you to find that there ARE groups out there that could REALLY use some help. The local volunteer Fire Department is a perfect example of this. Since they are volunteers, nobody gets paid the put their life on the line day in and day out, and the equipment they use is generally hand-me-down stuff from the bigger Fire Departments. Well today on GEARZ, Stacey decides to do something about that by taking a stock Chevy dually pickup, and transform it into a state-of-the-art Brush truck for the local Volunteer Fire Department. The cool thing is, he’s using a lot of aftermarket parts that YOU can use on your project…And if it’s good enough for Firemen that go into harm’s way, you KNOW it is good enough for what you will use it for. So strap in, and let’s go ride a Fire Truck!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Station Wagons…Love them or hate them, we all have some stories to tell about them! But most of us have never dreamed that a wagon could be a Hot rod or cool custom…but they can! Today on GEARZ, Stacey shows how much fun a wagon can be when it has an LS engine under the hood, and two four barrel carburetors sitting on it. If you ever wanted to thrash your Dad’s old Wagon, this is the show for you! After that Stacey digs into some of the most asked questions regarding shooting waterborne paint, and finally we take a trip to Texas to see how one body-man created his own business by selling tools, instead of using them. If you are looking for a new career, this could be your answer.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: When it comes to Cadillac’s, most people immediately think of lowering them down, and cruising with them. However, since the Cadillac Escalade is a great SUV, we thought it would be great to take the Escalade of Country artist Jason Sturgeon, and put a 3 ½” Skyjacker lift on it. Now you have no reason not to go hunting or fishing in style! After that we head to the land of the Predator, and see what it takes to be one of the most successful Monster Trucks of all time with Alan Pezo. Finally, we rub a little of that Monster Truck DNA on SGT. ROCK, as we upgrade the suspension and get it ready to do a little crushing of its own!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Everybody knows that you can get almost anything you want on a new car or truck these days. The problem is, if you use your truck for work, “almost” just doesn’t get it. Today on GEARZ, Stacey takes a decked out new truck, and adds some key tools and equipment to make it something that you can literally take to work or play with. After that, we dig into the mysterious world of leather interiors, and show how it is possible for you to buy a top quality leather upholstery kit, and install it yourself. Finally, we roll in the SL-C and show what it takes to put twin turbos on an LS7. It’s gonna be crazy, and it’s only gonna be on GEARZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.sub-title: Project Heavy Metal Suspension & Dax Shepard "Hit and Run" Lincoln Continental
programme.desc: Stacey rolls Heavy Metal back into the shop and begins to lay out some of the incredible modifications that he is going to be doing on this old junk yard ’69 International Cab over truck. A custom four-link air suspension goes on first, and then a slick air brake system to pull this big monster to a stop. A custom exhaust is also laid out, along with numerous other modifications to make this a one of a kind rig. If you have ever wondered if a Cab over could make a cool hot rod, you need to check this out. From there it’s off to the movies as Stacey digs into the impact and influence movie cars have on our lives and culture. To prove that point, He brings in actor Dax Shepard and his cool ’67 Lincoln Continental who are both starring in the new movie “Hit and Run”. So strap in and hold on, ‘cuz we might get airborne on this ride!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.sub-title: Foxbody Mustang Stick Shift Swap & V8 Interceptor Paint and Body
programme.desc: Everybody knows that 80’s and 90’s cars are hot right now, and one of the most desirable is the Fox bodied Mustang because it’s cheap and offers incredible bang for the buck. Today on GEARZ, Stacey rolls in a 1990 Mustang cop car and shows how easy it is to pull out an automatic tranny, and stuff in a Tremec 6spd so you can shift the gears properly. Then it’s off to the Hot Rod Institute in South Dakota to see the paint and body work that the instructors and students have been doing to the V8 Interceptor. If you thought this ’67 Cougar was wild before, wait ‘til you see this show! Here Kitty,…..Kitty……Kitty….

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: One of the hottest vehicles to hit the gear head world is the Side-by-Side, or Utility Vehicle. Once relegated to just farm or ranch work, the UTV is now something that you will see being used for Hunting, Fishing, Camping, Landscaping….virtually ANY kind of outdoor work or recreation. Of course that means the aftermarket is full of things to make an UTV better. Today on GEARZ, Stacey takes a Polaris Ranger and decks it out with a 3 ½” lift, bigger tires and axles, winches front and rear, and all kinds of other cool things to build an all-terrain vehicle that will really shine on the trail or off. After that he gives you a sneak peek at the new Ironworker that has everybody talking. If you work a lot with metal, you need this machine!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey puts a programmer on the Drag ‘N’ Wagon to finally bring the stripped down Ram Hot Rod truck to life. If you’ve been wondering what kind of performance potential these new Ram Express trucks have, wait until you see one lit up with a supercharger! Talk about breathing fire! After that Stacey lays out how to set up a shop with custom flooring, custom cabnets, and of course a lot of tools and toolboxes. If you’ve ever wondered about the best way to lay out a shop, and utilize your space, this is the show to see… and GEARZ is the show to watch!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Project Heavy Metal is back as Stacey rolls the International Cabover truck into the shop so he can outfit it with a vintage Holmes dual wrecker bed. The big truck continues to come together using parts from a junkyard wrecker, swap meet vintage beer kegs, and some new aftermarket parts. If you always thought that you had to spend big money to build a unique vehicle, this “Heavy Metal” truck will change your mind, and probably have you digging through junkyards in hopes of finding a vintage truck of your own!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Everybody wants a classic short bed pickup. Unfortunately, short beds are hard to find for a good price… but long beds are a dime-a-dozen, and cheap! The solution?... chop a long bed down! That is exactly what Stacey does on this episode of GEARZ. He takes a classic 67 Chevy long bed, and walks you through the way to cut the frame properly, so you have a safe and reliable truck when you are done. If you’ve heard about this kind of modification, but always thought it was too difficult or involved for you to do, you need to watch this episode of GEARZ and let the cutting begin!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Who put men on the moon? If you answered “Gearheads” then you are right… of course, we call them engineers and rocket scientists now. But that doesn’t change the fact that a bunch of hot rodders figured out how to get America into Space, and Stacey takes a look at the roots of the Space Program, and the invention of the moon buggy. Then it’s out to the NASA testing grounds to see the annual Moon buggy race. If you think you’ve seen some weird projects, wait until you see what some of these young minds have dreamed up. You may think you’re on another planet, but you’re not… you’re watching GEARZ!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey picks up right where he left off a few weeks ago and proceeds to install a brand new short bed, on the chassis of a truck that was born a LONG BED. That’s right, with the cutting done, the next step is to assemble a new short bed using all new aftermarket parts. You hear people say, “if it was that easy, everybody would be doing it!” Well, it IS that easy, and a lot of people ARE doing it… and YOU need to be one of them! Now… chop to it!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: It was one of the most lethal airplanes of WWII… the P-38 Lightning. Stacey takes a look at what made it so unique and why the German army nicknamed it the “Forked tailed devil”. But the legend didn’t end in the 1940’s… it continues on as Stacey showcases the new P-38 engine parts from Jon Kaase that you can put on your small block Ford to make it run like greased lightning! After that, Stacey sits down with Rock and Roll legend and certified car nut, James Burton, to dig into the unique connection between cars, guitars, and Rock and roll. Turn it on… crank it up… and hold on!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Some of the most neglected tools around the house are lawn and garden tools. Mowers, weed-eaters, chain saws, etc. all usually get thrown in a garage in the fall, never to be touched again until spring. Stacey walks through the simple steps on how to care for those tools, so they give you years of trouble free service. After that, He goes through the many parts you will need to put a manual transmission into a project, with Transmission Tech. Finally, if you’re looking for a simple project to do over the weekend, how about a muffler swap? You say “no”?... Stacey says “yes.”

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.sub-title: Time is Not On Their Side
programme.desc: For Dale and Matt sometimes the dotted line to treasure splits and heads in opposite directions. In this edition of What’s in the Barn, time is thrust to the forefront of this multi-state, long distance, north, south search. Timeless and priceless 110 year old bikes, antique cars, airplanes, and the infamous Egberts 1930 neon Harley-Davidson sign that coined the phrase “Ride a Winner” are high on this father and son’s list of “must haves”. The clock ticks, both literally and figuratively, on one rare time piece and two old-timer’s cars, bikes, and automobiles.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: Built in the mid-60’s by eccentric engineer “Wild Bill” Gelbke, the Road Dog was, and still is, the largest motorcycle ever built. It utilized aircraft tubing, Corvette disc brakes, and a Chevy truck differential to keep it stable. The one-off creation disappeared when Gelbke did in 1978. Outflanked once when the bike was spotted and sold to a private collector in 1995, Dale has vowed to locate the machine and make Wheels Through Time its final resting place.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “12hrs. & Running”: Dale turns a surprise 60th birthday party into a challenge to his guests to start 120 of the rarest motorcycles in the world.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: A California collector gambles on a big payday from his Crocker/Caddy combo.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: The RM Auction Company has worked with Dale before as a buyer, seller, historian, and caretaker at the prestigious Lee Hartung auction. But this event is no last minute rush to define one man’s treasures. This is a well calculated, time consuming, multi-media, and multi motorcycle and prized art deal.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “Yes, Dale there is a 100 Year Old Harley”: Dale hopes his labor of love becomes a prized possession when a six-figure Harley goes to auction.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “A Motorcycle Crime Story”: The horrific tale of a double murder over money and motorcycles.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: Matt is out for revenge. Last year Dale beat him badly at the Annual Vintage bike race in Barber, Alabama. But this year there is a whole new tale to tell. With just days until the race - Dale is secretly struggling to get the bike he beat Matt with last year up and working. Matt struggles just to locate a 100-year old bike. Matt's prayers are answered thanks to an old Catholic Priest he located who has possession of a bike. The priest might let Matt have the bike to race - but there are conditions. The toughest one: Don't tell Dale you have it. Can Matt afford to buy the bike and get it running in time for the race without Dale seeing it? Will Dale even get his broken bike started? And if they ever get to race, will Matt exact his revenge?

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: A cross-country race to lay claim to some of the world’s most sought after works specials.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: A vague tip leads Matt and Dale into a WWII era military warehouse and beyond.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: Home Depot Senior Vice President, Gordon Erickson, is a huge fan of Wheels Through Time. He is also a huge supporter of the Wounded Warrior program. For years the hardware giant has been donating goods and services to help returning servicemen with their fix-it-up projects. Now they would like to go one step further and build a WWII military bike to raise awareness and funds. Only problem is where to get one? Enter Dale and an exhaustive, time sensitive, cross country search for a rare military machine.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: An family farm in the mid-west contains houses, barns, outbuildings, trailers, grain silos and buses full of old stuff and perhaps the biggest stash of undiscovered old motorcycles in the country. The collection was put together by their unnamed father. Seller agrees to have Dale broker rare Excelsior for high-end client. Dale has the buyer, but will he outbid his own client for the exclusive find?

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “The Century Race”: Dale believes he found the bike that will help him beat a rival in an annual race of 100 year old motorcycles. But will it run?

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: Promoters of the prestigious Amelia Island Concours have called on Dale to develop a show and field bikes for an “Orphan Bike” show. They have defined orphan bike as extremely rare, that aren't a Harley nor Indian machines.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: Big Time Motorcycle Auction

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: A thousand bulging barns of choppers, bobbers, and board trackers are emptied and on display in the Quad Cities.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.sub-title: Time is Not On Their Side
programme.desc: For Dale and Matt sometimes the dotted line to treasure splits and heads in opposite directions. In this edition of What’s in the Barn, time is thrust to the forefront of this multi-state, long distance, north, south search. Timeless and priceless 110 year old bikes, antique cars, airplanes, and the infamous Egberts 1930 neon Harley-Davidson sign that coined the phrase “Ride a Winner” are high on this father and son’s list of “must haves”. The clock ticks, both literally and figuratively, on one rare time piece and two old-timer’s cars, bikes, and automobiles.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: Built in the mid-60’s by eccentric engineer “Wild Bill” Gelbke, the Road Dog was, and still is, the largest motorcycle ever built. It utilized aircraft tubing, Corvette disc brakes, and a Chevy truck differential to keep it stable. The one-off creation disappeared when Gelbke did in 1978. Outflanked once when the bike was spotted and sold to a private collector in 1995, Dale has vowed to locate the machine and make Wheels Through Time its final resting place.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “12hrs. & Running”: Dale turns a surprise 60th birthday party into a challenge to his guests to start 120 of the rarest motorcycles in the world.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: A California collector gambles on a big payday from his Crocker/Caddy combo.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: The RM Auction Company has worked with Dale before as a buyer, seller, historian, and caretaker at the prestigious Lee Hartung auction. But this event is no last minute rush to define one man’s treasures. This is a well calculated, time consuming, multi-media, and multi motorcycle and prized art deal.

programme.title: What's In the Barn?
programme.desc: “Yes, Dale there is a 100 Year Old Harley”: Dale hopes his labor of love becomes a prized possession when a six-figure Harley goes to auction.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: The V8 Interceptor is BACK and wearing a striking coat of glossy black paint! How did it happen? Well, Stacey walks you through the process and shows off the incredible paint and body work that was done by the Hot Rod Institute. From the subtle body nips and tucks, to the major fabrication of a new roof, this classic Cougar now has a straighter body than anything that may have rolled off the assembly line in 1967! But the paint is only half the story, as Stacey starts to re-assemble the car with bumpers, lights and engine, you start to get a good look at what is rapidly becoming the ultimate street predator!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: What is cooler than a vintage tow truck? … Nothing! Stacey proves that point by rolling Heavy Metal back into the GEARZ shop to outfit it with new electric winches, and an amazing custom tool box and light bar. This ’69 International cabover truck may have been rescued from a junkyard, but it won’t be long before this truck starts pulling off rescues of its own! This is recycling at it’s best! Then ride along with Stacey and crew as they travel to Minnesota and get the story on Edwards Manufacturing and how they have managed to stay in business for over a hundred years building simple tools. It’s all good, and it’s all GEARZ!!

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: When you say “HEMI”, you get people’s attention! But when you say “Ray Barton HEMI” you win races. Stacey and crew take you to Ray Barton Racing Engines to show you the amazing engines and parts they build, and why they go so fast. After that, Stacey digs into the interior of the V8 Interceptor and shows what kind of options you have when you are restoring or customizing the interior of your project. You’ll love the custom PRS guitar and matching wood dash and steering wheel! There is no doubt that this Cougar is the perfect blend of brutal power, and sophisticated elegance.

programme.title: Stacey David's Gearz
programme.desc: Stacey rolls in SGT. ROCK to take care of steering, brakes, and the exhaust system. With a quick trip to Stainless Works for a custom set of headers and exhaust system, and with the layout of the four-wheel hydraulic steering, it won’t be long before this big military beast is rolling under its own power. After that, he takes on the seat in Heavy Metal tow truck. Just because a project may have come out of a junkyard, doesn’t mean it has to look like junk. Stacey proves that by adding a custom bomber-style seat to this already VERY unique vehicle… this episode of GEARZ is the one to see!

programme.title: The American Dream
programme.desc: S4:E21 Join our hosts in Florida, as they showcase the reasons why West Palm Beach is the place many people choose to live, work, and play!

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: S2:E24 It's Christmas, and Jimmy Camel hosts a retrospective of Danger Mouse and Penfold's greatest hits from the first season.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: S2:E25 When Professor Squawkencluck is transformed by her own age-reversing balm, Danger Mouse discovers that he prefers her younger, more carefree self,.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: S2:E26 After the Mark 4 Danger Car becomes jammed along with the rest of the Danger cars, the gang turn to the good old Mark 3.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: S2:E27 When their time machine materializes in ancient Greece, Danger Mouse, Penfold, and King Kong Brunel realize their crash-landing has squished Perseus, the greatest hero in history.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: S2:E28 Danger Mouse and Penfold are left gadget-less when Professor Squawkencluck leaves the Danger Agency to work for tech genius Elon Muskrat.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: S2:E29 After Squawk zaps Penfold with a shrink-ray and injects him into Danger Mouse, Danger Mouse falls ill.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: S2:E30 The Danger Agents visit Squawk’s super-secret wild-west testing facility, home to a society of Penbots.

programme.title: Monsuno
programme.desc: S1:E4 When Chase receives a garbled message from his father asking him to meet, our hero cannot resist only to find Darkspin and Medea waiting for him instead.

programme.title: Strange Hill High
programme.desc: S1:E4 Becky dreams of becoming the star of Strange Hill’s rendition of Scary Poppins.

programme.title: Lost and Found Music Studios
programme.desc: S1:E6 The new members are revealed, and the veterans of the studio partner up with them to give them a crash course in life at the studio. Annabelle is stuck with Leia, who is too distracted by Luke and Maggie's new bond to be a proper mentor.

programme.title: Atlantis High
programme.desc: E7- Giles is arrested by local policeman, Officer Costello, while local crime-fighting hero, Silver Lining, is disappointed that he did not solve the crime.

programme.title: Wizards Vs Aliens
programme.desc: S2:E11 During a solar eclipse the Nekross put into effect their plan to control the moon's orbit, causing a permanent eclipse and total darkness on Earth.

programme.title: Alien Dawn
programme.desc: E7- Rock and Roll suggest that Cameron's father may be at a psychiatric hospital.

programme.title: This Just In
programme.desc: E10: When the power goes out on the Sunnybrook High campus, the gang searches for a lost friend. Rob and Becca discover the school’s basement.

programme.title: The American Dream
programme.desc: S3:E9 On this episode, join our hosts in California, as they showcase the reasons why Bay Area is the place many people choose to live, work, and play!

programme.title: Laura McKenzie's Traveler
programme.desc: S2:E2 - Exploring the city of Auckland. Laura works a sheep farm in the beautiful New Zealand countryside. Plus, Hobbiton, the set from the Lord of the Rings movies!

programme.title: Elizabeth Stanton's Great Big World
programme.desc: S7:E9 Journey into Scandinavia with Elizabeth and Jennifer Veal! See Copenhagen by boat, visit Tivoli Gardens, and catch the Royal Guard in action!

programme.title: Killer Instinct
programme.desc: S1:E6 Rob shows how earliest humans survived wild and vicious animals that provide food, clothing, and most importantly; weapons… Once armed with a bone knife, spear, and bow and arrow… he goes on the hunt with some aboriginal friends.

programme.title: Bikini Model Academy
programme.desc: After T.J. and Benji lose their girlfriends, they start a bikini modeling academy to make money and meet women. With help from their Uncle Seymour, the guys recruit pretty girls until an old enemy tries to shut them down.

programme.title: Popstar! Today
programme.desc: S4:E8 Top 3: Movies about guilt, Report: Dear Evan Hansen, Trivia: The Guilt Trip, Profile: Seth Rogen

programme.title: B-Sides with Pete Mar
programme.desc: S13:E32 Alt-pop artist Tiffany Day shares how her grandfather’s death inspired her debut album. R&B musician Dhruv talks about his evolution, being a queer role model.

programme.title: United Fight Alliance
programme.desc: S5:E24 Fighters from Australia, California, Nevada, Yugoslavia and Arizona's best gyms put their skills to the test to prove that they are ready for the big time.

programme.title: Banking on Bitcoin
programme.desc: Bitcoin is the most disruptive invention since the Internet, and now an ideological battle is underway between fringe utopists and mainstream capitalism. The film shows the players who are defining how this technology will shape our lives.

programme.title: in WHAT we TRUST
programme.desc: Money isn’t just a medium of exchange; it shapes economies and concentrates power among the few, leaving many in poverty. This film explores alternative systems, like the "palmas" currency in Brazilian favelas, which thrive with self-printed money. Experts discuss the global financial system’s fragility and ask: how can we regain control over money’s true power?

programme.title: Pioneers of Smart Watches
programme.desc: Pioneers ushered in this new reality of what consumers have come to expect today, like Garmin who turned their GPS prowess into devices for athletes, and Fitbit who led the consumer health movement from clip-ons to our wrists.

programme.title: Game Changers - Joanne K. Rowling
programme.desc: Bloomberg Game Changers profiles J.K. Rowling the author of the hugely successful Harry Potter series.

programme.title: The Monk Who Saved Japan Airlines
programme.desc: World disasters, rising airfares and over-indulgent management meant that Japan Airlines was destined to collapse. A Buddhist monk turned CEO with a modest management style was able to generate very high revenues.

programme.title: The Bio-Fuel Experiment - EP1
programme.desc: Environmentalist Sean Lee-Davies embarks on a 2,500km road trip from Singapore to Cambodia, fueling his 4WD with waste cooking oil and renewable resources like wind, solar, and pig manure. On a quest to prove biofuel’s potential, he faces numerous challenges in this eco-journey to deliver sustainable energy solutions to an orphanage.

programme.title: The Bio-Fuel Experiment - EP2
programme.desc: Environmentalist Sean Lee-Davies embarks on a 2,500km road trip from Singapore to Cambodia, fueling his 4WD with waste cooking oil and renewable resources like wind, solar, and pig manure. On a quest to prove biofuel’s potential, he faces numerous challenges in this eco-journey to deliver sustainable energy solutions to an orphanage.

programme.title: 97% Owned
programme.desc: This film presents serious research and verifiable evidence on our economic and financial system.

programme.title: Women Breaking Bounds
programme.desc: Worldwide, digital transformation is empowering women. In Indonesia, female entrepreneurs seize new opportunities but must battle tradition, stereotypes, and skeptical investors. How do these young founders navigate the challenges and claim their space in business?

programme.title: The Story of Maserati
programme.desc: Filmmaker Philip Selkirk examines the history of the Maserati automobile.

programme.title: Fortitude: Forging the Trillion Dollar Space Industry
programme.desc: A new space renaissance is unfolding—driven by human ambition, fueled by technological breakthroughs, and powered by the relentless pursuit of profit. *FORTITUDE* is a groundbreaking AppleTV documentary that takes audiences behind the scenes of the emerging space industry, revealing the visionaries, risks, and high-stakes ventures shaping our off-world future.

programme.title: High Profile Bankers
programme.desc: Finance crissis, managing banks, global economy. Bankers share their experiences.

programme.title: Funding the Future: Investing in Social Impact Bonds
programme.desc: "Funding the Future" explores Social Impact Bonds (SIBs), a financial innovation combining capitalism with social goals. While SIBs promise to solve societal issues like homelessness and crime, questions arise about the consequences of for-profit ventures in social services. Can they truly improve lives, or are they driven by financial returns?

programme.title: The Bitcoin Experiment
programme.desc: Following the global economic crisis, more and more people are questioning the way global markets function. Some are turning to decentralised payment systems like bitcoin in an attempt to regain control of the economy. But what is bitcoin?

programme.title: The Blockchain and Us
programme.desc: The award-winning "The Blockchain and Us" is the first documentary film about blockchain technology.

programme.title: Game Changers - Henry Kravis
programme.desc: Henry Kravis - His name is synonymous with "The Industrial Giant." As co-founder of KKR, Henry Kravis rewrote the rules for leveraged buyouts; he and his cousin George Roberts now rule an empire that dwarfs some of the most powerful public companies in the world.

programme.title: Mafia, Cocaine and White Collar Workers
programme.desc: There is the cocaine, tons of cocaine, one of the richest and most important Ndrangheta bosses in Europe and the so-called Swiss washing machine. This report traces the flow of dirty money from dealers in South America and offers a disconcerting window into the lives of Ticino’s “white collar workers”

programme.title: What went wrong at Kodak?
programme.desc: Kodak, a well-known brand with billion-dollar revenues that in 2005 filed for bankruptcy: what went so wrong? Corporate Secrets: Lessons from the boardroom, interview of the people directly involved. The decisions and mistakes that led to the collapse of this iconic company are uncovered.

programme.title: Pirates of Profit: Poverty and Revenge Fuel Maritime Attacks
programme.desc: Pirates of Profit delves into the modern piracy plaguing Nigeria and Somalia, where kidnappings of oil workers have become a lucrative business. Armed with speedboats, pirates target foreign companies, driven by economic disparity and environmental destruction. This documentary offers an unprecedented look at the forces behind these crimes.

programme.title: You're Being Monitored: When Tech Meets Tyranny
programme.desc: This documentary uncovers how Western surveillance technology, initially designed for national security, is sold to repressive regimes, enabling human rights abuses in Libya, Syria, and Bahrain. Investigative journalist Paul Moreira explores the ethical issues surrounding these deals, exposing how technology is weaponized against dissent.

programme.title: The Cost Of Fracking
programme.desc: Speaking to experts, campaigners and affected communities, we discover the real cost of this much touted “cheap” gas.

programme.title: Token - Economic System Of The Future?
programme.desc: The world of finance is in a constant state of change. With the advance of digitalization in the 21st century, this process has accelerated rapidly and opened up new opportunities to think about finance differently.

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Bernard gets bored trekking across the frozen Arctic wastes. Some abandoned equipment becomes a source of great entertainment, but not for long.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Zack tries to steal a parcel which Bernard is carrying. At first he succeeds, but Bernard doesn't give up that easily.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Even when he's asleep, Bernard is capable of anything – as he finds out when he wakes up in the morning.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Bernard has to deliver a pizza to a haunted house....and to its starving owner. But how is he going to get paid?

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: To the amazement of Zack, Bernard discovers he has some performing skills which he never knew he had.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Although Bernard has been shipwrecked, his real problems begin when he finds an abandoned motorboat which could get him back to shore.

programme.title: Bernard
programme.desc: Bernard makes a daring escape from prison, but once he's out, he realises that perhaps life inside wasn't so bad after all.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Brain Candy TV
programme.desc: Early learning for a brighter future! Your children will love to learn their ABCs, numbers, colors and even some math and science with the help of our action-packed vehicles including monster trucks, dump trucks, trains and more, plus our cute dog Lizzy.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends Minis
programme.desc: Get ready to watch Talking Tom and Friends at their cutest! Mini in size, but massive in fun, the Minis check out the day-to-day world of the friends we all know and love where they do the most ordinary things in the most extraordinary ways.

programme.title: Yeti Tales
programme.desc: Join Us in Yeti Tales !

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Misha, the Purple Cat
programme.desc: Misha is a very lively, alert cat. She is very interested in investigating everything going on around her, which means she has some very entertaining adventures with her friends. Many things can happen in Misha’s world; especially exciting adventures, mysterious investigations, hilarious competitions... all with a feeling of close friendship.

programme.desc: With a new principal in town, Rhyme and the Chicken Girls must band together to save the dance.

programme.title: Boss Cheer
programme.desc: Dani and Jack look for a way to save the squad. Charlotte makes a choice that will change Boss Cheer forever.

programme.title: Boss Cheer
programme.desc: Kody knows there's only one way to save Boss Cheer now, now the Cheer Devils in the National Championship.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Luke's second chance at glory brings many secrets to the surface.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Autumn and Celeste grow closer, while Luke has to choose between his real family and his racing family.

programme.title: Stuck
programme.desc: Fiona decides to make it a good day by being kind to everyone in her life.

programme.title: Stuck
programme.desc: A bad day for Fiona turns into something much, much worse.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Harmony helps Rhyme make up her mind, and Flash goes out for the team.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: In the season finale, the Attaway team faces stiff competition.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Rhyme & her friends have always danced together, but this year - there's only three spots on the team.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: When things get dire, it’s up to Mani, Harmony, Goth Girl & her new crush, Goth Boy, to hunt up some grub.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Mani, Desiree, and the campers devise a plan to con the con-man, Billy.
