programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf's worries make him break into a rash of worrywarts. The only way to relieve him of his bout of indecision-inducing disease is to have him rub the horn of a Wartmonger, a sloppy, slimy, stupid and brutal enemy of the Pussywillow Pixies...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Poor Lazy! All he wants is a good night's rest. But no, all the Smurfs throw a party for him and, what's more, he gets dragged into a silly argument about painting giant Bigmouth's toes a bright tangerine red... It's a long, sleepless night for poor Lazy Smurf!

programme.title: Smurf Box Derby
programme.desc: Handy Smurf makes another invention: the Smurfmobile. Each Smurf has his – or her – customized vehicle and all, or almost all, the Smurfs enjoy a little spin... But then the evil wizard Gargamel gets hold of the idea and starts making trouble for the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: This time, Gargamel's sinister plan works too well. He just wanted a slight flood to drown the Smurfs. But this is almost the end of the world, and the Smurfs have to build an ark to survive... Will Smurfette's friend, the little winged horse, arrive on time?

programme.title: Babes In Wartland
programme.desc: Baby Smurf, playing hide-and-seek, hides in a basket that gets thrown in the river... Baby Smurf floats to the land of the Pussywillow Pixies... But the nasty, stupid Wartmonger reacts strangely to Baby...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The latest invention of both Greedy and Handy Smurf: a soft, refreshing delicacy that they call Smurf cream but that we humans know as ice cream. All would be well if rivalry did not come between the two Smurfs... And if Gargamel did not do his best to be unpleasant!

programme.title: The Bad Place
programme.desc: What is this little moon coming from above? Why, it's a crater-pockmarked globe of mud inhabited by the Grimeys, a family of mud-splattering, mud-eating creatures from out there in the sky. Not all the Smurfs are enthusiastic about the visitors....

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: The Smurfomatic Smurfolator
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel still wants to destroy the Smurfs. This time, he sends on the forest the seeds of a creeping weed that is sure to entangle all the Smurfs... But Handy Smurf has devised a smurfomatic smurfolator...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Plotting to rid himself of the Smurfs, Gargamel casts a spell over Bigmouth and disguises himself as a Smurf. Thinking he is a Smurf, Bigmouth nearly succeeds in wrecking everything in the Village of the Smurfs until Papa Smurf comes up with a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When Gargamel is able to make a flying carpet out of a patchwork quilt, accidents are bound to happen...The result of one accident is that a piece of the flying bedspread is used as Baby Smurf's diaper, with very surprising results...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: How do you bring a baby triceratops back to his mama and papa? The Smurfs are doing their best, dodging dinosaurs and mysterious beings that live in prehistoric caves...

programme.title: Heavenly Smurfs
programme.desc: Once again, Gargamel's infallible plan to catch the Smurfs has been foiled. But the Smurfs play a trick on him: disguised as tiny blue angels, they will teach him to mend his ways...

programme.title: The Smurfs' Firebrigade
programme.desc: The Smurf village institutes a fire brigade to battle the flames in Greedy's kitchen only to discover that Gargamel has taken all of their water. Not realizing the weakness of his dam, Gargamel and Azrael are washed away when it breaks and floods the Smurf village, extinguishing the fire.

programme.title: A Gift For Papa's Day
programme.desc: Gargamel steals Papa Smurf's birthday hat to lure the Smurfs into a trap. Papa tricks Gargamel into releasing them and then keeps the unusual hat to remind everyone of their great escape.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The boy from the wood and Laconia, the deaf-mute elf, ask Papa Smurf to celebrate their wedding. The Smurfs are getting the party ready, following the advice of the Smurfette, when Gargamel comes to put a spoke in their wheel.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Guess who's coming back to the Village of the Smurfs? Grandpa Smurf himself, who's been away for some five hundred years. He returns with grave news: the Smurfs will have to find the four magical elements to make the long life Stone, or their very existence is going to be in jeopardy. Can they do it in just one day?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Thinking a treasure is to be found, Gargamel follows the Smurfs every step: into Jack Frost's cave, then to the desert in search of the Pyramid of Zenobia, and in the West Wind's lair... The Smurfs must find the four elements of the long life Stone before sundown. But can it be done? Can the Smurfs preserve their very existence?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: While the Smurfs left at the Village try to find Grandpa Smurf's box and survive a flood caused by a geyser, Grandpa himself, Papa Smurf, Sassette and a few Smurfs more try to secure the last missing element from a volcano guarded by the terrifying wooden Tikis... and Gargamel, with Azrael as usual, do their best to foul things up for the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: As if Gargamel didn't have enough troubles as it is. Now he is saddled with a new problem, a problem by the name of Scruple, a new apprentice. A lazy, insolent, good-for-nothing character who will help in getting hold of the enchanted quill, a magic pen that writes nothing but the truth... and is going, or so Gargamel hopes, to aid in catching the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Snappy doesn't always do as he is told. For instance, he is a little careless in putting out the campfire where the Smurfs have been roasting marshmallows. Even though the Smurfs are doing the impossible in trying to save the forest from the holocaust, the situation looks bleak. Snappy is hunted by remorse. And he would be even more so if he knew what the evil Gargamel is up to.

programme.title: Smurfing In Sign Language
programme.desc: The Smurfs meet a woodland elf, who teaches them sign language after Gargamel inflicts a no-speaking potion on them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Thinking Baby Smurf is a leprechaun, two poachers kidnap him and try to get the small one to tell them where his pot of gold is hidden. Papa Smurf organizes everyone to attack the villains with Smurfberry pies so Baby can escape.

programme.title: The Littlest Witch
programme.desc: On an errand to Witch Haven for Papa Smurf, the little blue creatures meet a tiny witch and teach her how to be good while at the same time cause another witch to lose her wicked powers for one year after she falls into the river.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: In the distant valley of Nodrog, the Smurfs meet the Molians who try to dissuade them from obtaining the magical Smurf-stone that Papa Smurf needs to cure his gout.

programme.title: Smurfy Acres
programme.desc: The Smurfs learn there's no place like home when Gargamel gets the Book of Spells to conjure up a new and more beautiful place for the Smurfs to live; a place that is very convenient for him to lay a trap for them!

programme.title: Wedding Bells For Gargamel
programme.desc: The Smurfs befriend a maiden in distress who is betrothed to Gargamel by convincing her father that the foolish wizard is insane.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs help a fairy queen outwit the evil fairy Fallon who tries to take away her son's magic rattle.

programme.title: All Creatures Great And Smurf
programme.desc: Nat Smurf is convinced he can help all creatures with his healing ways, even the wicked Azrael after he gets his paw caught in a trap. He heals well, but even though he is tempted to stay with the Smurfs, he runs back to Gargamel while leading his old master away from Smurf Village.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Smurf Who Would Be King
programme.desc: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel wants to create a monster. A horrible, gigantic creature, an awesome being that is going to destroy all the Smurfs! But Gargamel makes a slight mistake, and the result is going to astonish him and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: The Gargoyle Of Quarrel Castle
programme.desc: In Quarrel Castle, you almost never hear a kind word. Both Selwyn the Warlock and Tallulah, his witch-mate, spend their time quarrelling. Tharp, their pet gargoyle, takes refuge in the Village of Smurfs. But something terrible is going to happen....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Accidents do happen. This time it is Jokey Smurf's mistake that ends up with his shadow coming to independent life! And the shadow loves to play practical jokes on the whole population of the Village of the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Gargamel has thrown in his slime pond so much poisonous muck that the water becomes enchanted and Gargamel, after falling in, suddenly finds himself much smaller that he would wish. Actually he is going to be so small that Papa Smurf will save him!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: It must be a coincidence: just as an elephant crosses the forest and meets baby Smurf, the Smurfs decide to create a big Smurf Circus. They are going to meet the infernal sorcerer Balthazar and Baby Smurf will have a lot of fun...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel once again meets Esmeralda, the gypsy fortune-teller, and she finds a novel way of getting the gold coin that Gargamel imprudently shows her. But the Smurfs in their turn are tricked into believing there is such a thing as a good-luck tree...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: The Little Orange Horse With Gold Shoes
programme.desc: Sliding down a rainbow, a little winged horse loses a golden shoe. He meets the Smurfette and she helps him look for his lost horseshoe. They fall in love somehow, for who could be unmoved by the charm of a little orange horse... Or of a Smurfette?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: There is an evil power in the Titan's crown that Miner Smurf finds underground. And Greedy Smurf is the Smurf to fall victim to it. Then Gargamel comes up with some new schemes to destroy the Smurfs, and everything gets hopelessly tangled.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Papa Smurf's worries make him break into a rash of worrywarts. The only way to relieve him of his bout of indecision-inducing disease is to have him rub the horn of a Wartmonger, a sloppy, slimy, stupid and brutal enemy of the Pussywillow Pixies...

A lazy, insolent, good-for-nothing character who will help in getting hold of the enchanted quill, a magic pen that writes nothing but the truth... and is going, or so Gargamel hopes, to aid in catching the Smurfs.

Even though the Smurfs are doing the impossible in trying to save the forest from the holocaust, the situation looks bleak. Snappy is hunted by remorse. And he would be even more so if he knew what the evil Gargamel is up to.

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets... But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Grouchy, the Smurf who hates everything, doubly hates his own birthday party and goes to hide in Shadow Swamp... He is going to meet strange beings and stranger adventures while the other Smurfs search for him...

programme.title: Smurfiplication
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel creates a magic formula that duplicates everything it touches. And surprise! Suddenly there are six Brainy Smurf! This creates a few interesting situations in the Village... And also at Gargamel's!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: A dragon terrorizes the Village of the Smurfs. To put the dragon to rest, the Smurfs must find the noted Chinese traveler. Fortunately, Papa Smurf is able to understand the strange customs of the stranger, and even to speak a few words.

programme.title: The Man In The Moon
programme.desc: Sick and tired of not being appreciated, the Man in the Moon quits his job and retires on Earth, to the Village of the Smurfs. The absence of a First Quarter Moon wreaks havoc in the customs of the Smurfs, and Mother Nature and Father Time get dragged in...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: There is a prize for the cutest pet of a Smurf. Baby Smurf brings a cute, lovely, affectionate Glowing Darling, a pet anybody falls in love with... But this pet is a creation of Gargamel, the evil wizard intent on destroying the Smurfs!

programme.title: Symbols Of Wisdom
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf desperately wants to be more like Papa Smurf. Can a hair tonic be the answer? Can Gargamel be able to finally capture the Smurfs? Does wisdom really reside in a beard?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Brainy feels up to the occasion when he starts the recipe for cookies. He is sure to win the contest: he borrowed a recipe from Papa Smurf's Book of Magic. But a big surprise, and some nasty happenings, await poor Brainy... and the whole Village.

programme.title: Secret Of The Village Well
programme.desc: Why is Clumsy Smurf waiting day and night near the Village well? What is the wish that he wants to be kept secret? How is Gargamel going to be mixed up in this mysterious affair? Is Gargamel going to catch the Smurfs at last?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs must find a bunny family to pull their float in the Autumn Carnival. Gargamel sees his chance to capture the little blue people and disguises himself as a giant bunny. Is he going to catch all the Smurfs in one fell swoop?

programme.title: Stop And Smurf The Roses
programme.desc: Wicked Chlorhydris, the sorceress, wants to destroy all love and beauty on Earth. She has to annihilate Wood Elf Grove, where the loving mute elf Laconia cares for the wild flowers. But the Smurfs are there to save the day.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Jealous of the attention Vanity Smurf receives when he breaks his toe, Jokey Smurf feigns sickness in hopes of getting recognition. Unfortunately, his ploy turns against him and instead of loving care all he receives is the proverbial pound of curse.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: When the emergency call rings, all the Smurfs in the Village drop what they are doing and run to hear the news. But when Vanity Smurf calls for an assembly so that the Smurfs can admire his new hat, it is too much. They send him on his way out of the village, and Vanity has the bad luck of meeting Lofty, the Elf, who suggests a horrible mud bath...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: What is that strange talking frog that Morlock the Wizard sends all of Prince Theodore's soldiers to catch? Is it a demon frog, as he says, or something else? Truth will out when Smurfette and the Smurflings meet the frog. They help to change this frog back into Prince Theodore himself, for he's been the victim of a spell cast by Morlock.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Every 500 years, Castle Captor appears and abducts innocent travelers. Grandpa takes off in his balloon for the castle, where he meets Nanny Smurf, who’s been missing for 500 years. They have only a short time to escape, or they’ll become permanent guests!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.sub-title: Land Of The Lost And Found
programme.desc: Hefty, Handy, and Brainy lose Papa's telescope and Scour, the Lord of Lost and Found, finds it. The Smurfs say they'll trade anything to get it back, so Scour takes their most valuable possessions – handiness, heftiness and braininess. They journey to his domain to retrieve what was lost.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The evil warlock Nemesis shows up at the Wizards' Library to steal the knowledge from the Archives of Evil and so get the Long Life Stone. But it's Brainy who inadvertently saves the day when he switches Greedy's cookbook and Papa's spell book.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Roommates Smurfette and Nanny are getting on each other's nerves, so the time has come for Nanny to have a house of her own. As Nanny and Smurfette trek off to find a house-warming plant, the others design the Smurfliest house for her.

programme.title: Smurfing For Ghosts
programme.desc: Peewit is at the castle of his friends Selwyn and Tallulah when Uncle Fenwick, the friendly ghost, asks for his help in chasing a few relatives who've come to haunt him... Peewit has to get help from the Smurfs, and a merry chase begins...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Las preocupaciones de Papa Pitufo hacen que le salgan verrugas. La unica forma de librarle de esta enfermedad causada por la indecision es que frote el cuerno de uno de los Verrugosos, los desalinados, viscosos, estupidos y brutales enemigos de las haditas del Bosque de los Sauces...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Una Fiesta De Pijamas Para Perezoso
programme.desc: ¡Pobre Pitufo Perezoso! Todo lo que desea es una buena noche de descanso. Pero no: todos los Pitufos celebran una fiesta en su honor y, lo que es peor, se ve arrastrado a una absurda discusion sobre pintar los dedos de los pies de Giganton de un brillante color mandarina. ¡Va a ser una larga noche en vela para el pobre Pitufo Perezoso!

programme.title: La Carrera De Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Carpintero ha ideado un nuevo invento: el pitufimovil. Todos los Pitufos tienen su propio vehiculo personalizado y todos (o casi todos) disfrutan dando una vuelta en ellos. Sin embargo, el malvado mago Gargamel se aprovecha de la idea y empieza a causar problemas a los Pitufos...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Regreso De Los Ojos Azules
programme.desc: Esta vez, el siniestro plan de Gargamel ha funcionado demasiado bien. Tan solo queria una pequena inundacion que ahogase a los Pitufos. Pero casi provoca el fin del mundo, y los Pitufos tienen que construir un arca para sobrevivir. ¿Llegara a tiempo el pequeno caballo alado, el amigo de Pitufina?

programme.title: Un Bebe Ante Su Majestad
programme.desc: Mientras juega al escondite, Bebe Pitufo se esconde en una cesta que acaba en el rio. Bebe Pitufo flota hasta la tierra de las haditas del Bosque de los Sauces. Sin embargo, los desagradables y estupidos Verrugosos reaccionan de forma extrana al ver al bebe.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El ultimo invento conjunto de Pitufo Goloso y Pitufo Carpintero es una suave y refrescante delicia que deciden llamar pituficrema, y que los humanos conocemos como helado. Todo seria genial si la rivalidad no hubiese surgido entre ambos Pitufos... ¡y si Gargamel no se esforzara tanto por ser desagradable!

programme.title: Los Visitantes
programme.desc: ¿Que es esa pequena luna que ha llegado del cielo? Es un globo de barro cubierto de crateres y habitado por los Lodosos, una familia de criaturas que vienen del cielo y comen y salpican barro. No todos los Pitufos demuestran entusiasmo por los visitantes...

programme.title: La Belleza Es Superficial
programme.desc: Periwinkle, un hada vanidosa, se molesta cuando su espejo magico le dice que el ser mas hermoso es Pitufo Vanidoso, y no ella. Periwinkle secuestra a Pitufo Vanidoso, pero los demas Pitufos acuden al rescate. Periwinkle se da cuenta de que ha obrado mal y se convierten en amigos.

programme.title: El Pitufador Pitufomatico
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel sigue queriendo destruir a los Pitufos. Esta vez, envia al bosque las semillas de una planta trepadora que enredara a todos los Pitufos. Sin embargo, Pitufo Carpintero ha ideado un Pitufador Pitufomatico...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: En su plan por librarse de los Pitufos, Gargamel le lanza un hechizo a Giganton y se disfraza de Pitufo. Creyendo que es un Pitufo, Giganton esta a punto de destrozar por completo la Aldea Pitufa hasta que Papa Pitufo acude con una cura.

programme.title: El Amigo Mas Pitufo
programme.desc: Pitufo Filosofo tenia un amigo: Pitufo Torpe. Pero el pobre Pitufo Torpe es tan... bueno, torpe, que Pitufo Filosofo no quiere volverle a ver. Asi que ahora no queda nadie dispuesto a escucharle. Quiza Buddy, el apuesto diablillo que ha conocido por casualidad cerca del gran roble, pueda convertirse en amigo de Pitufo Filosofo...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel consigue transformar una colcha en una alfombra voladora, lo que hace inevitable que se produzcan accidentes. El resultado de uno de esos accidentes es que un trozo de la tela voladora acaba utilizandose como panal para Bebe Pitufo, con resultados realmente sorprendentes...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: ¿Como se puede devolver un bebe triceratops a sus padres? Los Pitufos estan haciendo todo lo que pueden, esquivando dinosaurios y misteriosos seres que viven en cuevas prehistoricas...

programme.title: Ya No Tengo Miedo
programme.desc: Una vez mas, el infalible plan de Gargamel para atrapar a los Pitufos ha fracasado. Los Pitufos aprovechan para gastarle una broma: disfrazados de pequenos angeles azules, le ensenaran a enmendar su conducta...

programme.title: La Brigada De Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando en la Aldea Pitufa forman una brigada de incendios para combatir las llamas que devoran la cocina de Pitufo Goloso, se dan cuenta de que Gargamel les ha dejado sin agua. Sin embargo, no se da cuenta de la fragilidad de su presa, que se rompe y provoca que el agua arrastre a Gargamel y Azrael e inunde la Aldea Pitufa, extinguiendo el fuego.

programme.title: Regalo Para El Dia De Papa Pitufo
programme.desc: Gargamel ha robado el gorro de cumpleanos de Papa Pitufo para atraer a los Pitufos hacia una trampa. Papa Pitufo, tras enganar a Gargamel para que los libere, guarda ese gorro tan especial para que todos recuerden esa gran fuga.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El chico del bosque y Laconia, la elfa muda y sorda, preguntan a Papa Pitufo que celebre su boda. Mientras los Pitufos preparan la fiesta bajo las ordenes de Pitufina, Gargamel hace acto de presencia.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: ¿A que no adivinas quien ha regresado a la Aldea Pitufa? El mismisimo Abuelo Pitufo, que llevaba fuera de ella unos quinientos anos. Y vuelve con inquietantes noticias: los Pitufos deben encontrar los cuatro elementos magicos para restaurar la Piedra de la Longevidad, o su misma existencia se vera en peligro. ¿Conseguiran hacerlo en tan solo un dia?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Creyendo que van detras de un tesoro, Gargamel sigue los pasos de los Pitufos: primero, a la cueva de Juan Hielo; despues, al desierto en busca de la piramide de Zenobia; y luego a la guarida del viento del oeste. Los Pitufos deben encontrar los cuatro elementos de la Piedra de la Longevidad antes de la puesta de sol. Pero ¿lo lograran? ¿Podran preservar los Pitufos su mera existencia?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Mientras los Pitufos que quedan en la aldea intentan encontrar la caja de Abuelo Pitufo y sobreviven a una inundacion provocada por un geiser, el propio Abuelo Pitufo, Papa Pitufo, Sasita y algunos Pitufos mas intentan conseguir el ultimo elemento que les falta en un volcan custodiado por los Tikis, unos aterradores guerreros de madera... y Gargamel, acompanado por Azrael como es habitual, se esfuerza al maximo por poner las cosas dificiles a los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Como si Gargamel no tuviese ya bastantes problemas... Ahora se enfrenta a uno mas: un problema con el nombre de Escrupuloso, su nuevo aprendiz. Un personaje vago, insolente e inutil que le ayudara a hacerse con la pluma encantada: una pluma magica que siempre escribe la verdad y que le permitira, o al menos eso espera Gargamel, capturar a los Pitufos.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Colerico no siempre hace lo que se le dice. Por ejemplo, no tiene demasiado cuidado al apagar la hoguera donde los Pitufos han estado asando malvaviscos. A pesar de que los Pitufos estan haciendo lo imposible para salvar al bosque del desastre, la situacion es desoladora. Pitufo Colerico se siente lleno de remordimiento. Y lo estaria mas aun si supiese lo que trama el malvado Gargamel.

programme.title: Lenguaje De Senas
programme.desc: Los Pitufos conocen a un elfo del bosque, que les ensena la lengua de signos despues de que Gargamel les administre una pocion de enmudecimiento.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Creyendo que Bebe Pitufo es un duende, dos cazadores furtivos lo secuestran e intentan que el pequeno les diga donde ha escondido la olla de oro. Papa Pitufo organiza a todos para atacar a los villanos con tartas de pitufrutas y lograr que Bebe Pitufo pueda escapar.

programme.title: Una Brujita No Tan Mala
programme.desc: Mientras hacen un recado para Papa Pitufo en el conservatorio de las brujas, las pequenas criaturas azules conocen a una diminuta bruja y le ensenan como ser buena; al mismo tiempo, hacen que otra bruja pierda sus poderes maleficos durante un ano al caer en el rio.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Busqueda De La Piedra Magica
programme.desc: En el lejano Valle de Nodrog, los Pitufos se encuentran con El Molians, que quiere conseguir la Pitufo-Piedra que Papa Pitufo necesita para curar.

programme.title: Las Nuevas Colinas Pitufas
programme.desc: Los Pitufos descubren que no hay ningun sitio como el hogar cuando Gargamel consigue que su libro de hechizos conjure un nuevo lugar mas hermoso para que los Pitufos vivan en el: ¡un lugar perfecto para que pueda tenderles una trampa!

programme.title: Campanas De Boda Para Gargamel
programme.desc: Los Pitufos se hacen amigos de una dama en apuros que esta prometida a Gargamel, ya que convencen a su padre de que el estupido mago esta loco.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos ayudan a una reina de las hadas a vencer al malvado Falan, que intenta robar el sonajero magico de su hijo.

programme.title: A Todas Las Criaturas Grandes Y Pequenas
programme.desc: Pitufo Natural esta convencido de que puede ayudar a todas las criaturas con sus dones curativos, incluso al malvado Azrael, cuya pata queda atrapada en una trampa. El gato se cura y, a pesar de que tiene la tentacion de quedarse con los Pitufos, regresa con Gargamel, pero conduce a su dueno hacia un lugar alejado de la Aldea Pitufa.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Pitufo Que Queria Ser Rey
programme.desc: Pitufo Sonador anhela convertirse en rey despues de leer una historia sobre reyes. Mientras esta en su barco, cae a traves de un remolino y llega a una tierra de pequenos seres que creen que Pitufo Sonador es su rey, desaparecido hace mucho tiempo. Cuando se enfrenta a los Norfnangs, los enemigos de esos pequenos seres, descubre que no son terrorificos en absoluto. Pitufo Sonador se da un golpe en la cabeza y descubre al despertar que todo habia sido un sueno, aunque encuentra en su gorro una joya identica a las que extraian esos pequenos seres de su mina.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel quiere crear un monstruo. Una criatura horrible y gigantesca, ¡un ser imponente que destruya a todos los Pitufos! Pero Gargamel comete un pequeno error y el resultado les dejara asombrados a su gato Azrael y a el.

programme.title: El Castillo De Las Disputas
programme.desc: En el Castillo de las Disputas casi nunca se escuchan palabras amables. El brujo Selwyn y su pareja, la bruja Tallulah, se pasan el tiempo discutiendo. Tharp, la gargola que tienen como mascota, se refugia en la Aldea Pitufa. Pero algo terrible va a suceder...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: A veces ocurren accidentes. ¡En esta ocasion, un error de Pitufo Bromista hace que su sombra cobre vida! Y a la sombra le encanta hacer bromas a todos los habitantes de la Aldea Pitufa...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel ha echado tantas sustancias toxicas en su estanque que el agua se vuelve encantada. Tras caerse en el estanque, Gargamel se vuelve pequeno, tan pequeno que Papa Pitufo tendra que salvarlo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Por pura casualidad, un elefante que pasaba por el bosque se encuentra con Bebe Pitufo, y los Pitufos deciden crear un gran Circo. Van a visitar al hechicero infernal Baltazar y Bebe Pitufo se lo esta pasando genial...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Epidemia De La Tos Saltarina
programme.desc: Gargamel propaga un extrano germen por el bosque que hace toser a todos sin parar. Bebe Pitufo es la primera victima y todo el pueblo esta muy preocupado...Afortunadamente, Papa Pitufo cree conocer la solucion.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado hechicero Gargamel acude una vez mas a Esmeralda, la adivinadora, la cual se las ingenia para hacerse con el dinero de Gargamel. Cuando es el turno de los Pitufos, les hace creer que existe un arbol de la suerte...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Caballo Anaranjado De Los Zapatos De Oro
programme.desc: Deslizandose por un arcoiris, un caballito alado pierde una herradura dorada. Tras encontrarse con Pitufina, ambos van en su busqueda. Al final, acaban encarinandose ya que quien podria resistirse al encanto de un caballito alado...o de Pitufina?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hay algun tipo de poder maligno en la corona del Titan que Minero encuentra bajo tierra, y Avaricioso acaba sucumbiendo a el. Cuando Gargamel aparece con una de sus fechorias en mente, todo se acaba enrevesandose.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Las preocupaciones de Papa Pitufo hacen que le salgan verrugas. La unica forma de librarle de esta enfermedad causada por la indecision es que frote el cuerno de uno de los Verrugosos, los desalinados, viscosos, estupidos y brutales enemigos de las haditas del Bosque de los Sauces...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: Una Fiesta De Pijamas Para Perezoso
programme.desc: ¡Pobre Pitufo Perezoso! Todo lo que desea es una buena noche de descanso. Pero no: todos los Pitufos celebran una fiesta en su honor y, lo que es peor, se ve arrastrado a una absurda discusion sobre pintar los dedos de los pies de Giganton de un brillante color mandarina. ¡Va a ser una larga noche en vela para el pobre Pitufo Perezoso!

programme.desc: Como si Gargamel no tuviese ya bastantes problemas... Ahora se enfrenta a uno mas: un problema con el nombre de Escrupuloso, su nuevo aprendiz. Un personaje vago, insolente e inutil que le ayudara a hacerse con la pluma encantada: una pluma magica que siempre escribe la verdad y que le permitira, o al menos eso espera Gargamel, capturar a los Pitufos.

programme.desc: Pitufo Colerico no siempre hace lo que se le dice. Por ejemplo, no tiene demasiado cuidado al apagar la hoguera donde los Pitufos han estado asando malvaviscos. A pesar de que los Pitufos estan haciendo lo imposible para salvar al bosque del desastre, la situacion es desoladora. Pitufo Colerico se siente lleno de remordimiento. Y lo estaria mas aun si supiese lo que trama el malvado Gargamel.

programme.title: Pitufos Y Solo Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel ha conseguido capturar a Pitufina. Ahora, se dispone a administrarle un suero de la verdad para descubrir todos los secretos de Papa Pitufo... pero Gargamel comete un gran error y le da a Pitufina una formula de las mentiras.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: El Secreto Del Pantano De Las Sombras
programme.desc: Pitufo Grunon, que odia todo, detesta especialmente su propia fiesta de cumpleanos, por lo que decide esconderse en el Pantano de las Sombras. Alli encontrara extranos seres y vivira aventuras aun mas extranas mientras los demas Pitufos le buscan...

programme.title: Pituplicacion
programme.desc: El malvado mago Gargamel crea una formula magica que duplica todo aquello que toca. Y...¡sorpresa! ¡Ahora hay seis Pitufos Filosofos! Esto provoca algunas situaciones interesantes en la aldea... ¡Y tambien en casa de Gargamel!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Un dragon aterroriza la Aldea Pitufa. Para vencer al dragon, los Pitufos deben encontrar al famoso viajero chino. Afortunadamente, Papa Pitufo es capaz de entender las peculiares costumbres del extranjero, e incluso de hablar algunas palabras en su idioma.

programme.title: El Hombre De La Luna
programme.desc: Cansado y harto de que no le aprecien, el Hombre de la Luna deja su trabajo y se retira en la Tierra, en la Aldea Pitufa. La ausencia de la luna en cuarto creciente desata el caos en las costumbres de los Pitufos, y Madre Naturaleza y Padre Tiempo tambien se ven arrastrados por el embrollo...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Hay un premio para aquel Pitufo que tenga la mascota mas adorable. Bebe Pitufo acude con Carino Dorado, una mascota adorable y carinosa de la que todo el mundo se enamora. Sin embargo, esa mascota es una creacion del malvado mago Gargamel con la que pretende destruir a los Pitufos.

programme.title: Simbolos De Sabiduria
programme.desc: Pitufo Filosofo esta desesperado por parecerse mas a Papa Pitufo. ¿Podria ser la respuesta un tonico capilar? ¿Conseguira Gargamel capturar por fin a los Pitufos? ¿Reside realmente la sabiduria en una barba?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufo Filosofo se siente preparado para la ocasion cuando empieza a preparar una receta de galletas. Esta convencido de que va a ganar el concurso, ya que ha tomado prestada una receta del libro de magia de Papa Pitufo. Sin embargo, una gran sorpresa y algunas situaciones desagradables aguardan al pobre Pitufo Filosofo y a toda la aldea.

programme.title: Secreto Del Pozo De La Aldea
programme.desc: ¿Por que Pitufo Torpe espera dia y noche junto al pozo de la aldea? ¿Cual es el deseo que quiere mantener en secreto? ¿Y como esta involucrado Gargamel en este asunto misterioso? ¿Lograra Gargamel atrapar por fin a los Pitufos?

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Los Pitufos deben encontrar a una familia de conejos para tirar de su carroza durante el Festival de Otono. Gargamel ve la oportunidad de capturar a los pequenos seres azules y se disfraza de conejo gigante. ¿Conseguira atrapar a todos los Pitufos de un plumazo?

programme.title: Detente A Pitufar Rosas
programme.desc: La malvada hechicera Clorhidris quiere borrar todo el amor y la belleza de la faz de la tierra. Para ello, debe aniquilar la arboleda de los elfos de los bosques, donde la encantadora elfa muda Laconia cuida de las flores silvestres. Sin embargo, los Pitufos estan ahi para salvar la situacion.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Celoso por la atencion que recibe Pitufo Vanidoso cuando se rompe un dedo del pie, Pitufo Bromista finge estar enfermo con la esperanza de que le hagan caso. Desafortunadamente, su treta se vuelve en su contra y, en lugar de amorosos cuidados, todo lo que recibe es un proverbial merecido.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cuando se produce una emergencia, todos los Pitufos de la aldea dejan lo que tienen entre manos y corren a oir las noticias. Pero que Pitufo Vanidoso convoque una asamblea para que los Pitufos puedan admirar su nuevo gorro es pasarse de la raya. Le echan de la aldea y Pitufo Vanidoso tiene la mala suerte de encontrarse con Lofty, el elfo, que le recomienda darse un horrible bano de fango...

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: ¿Que es esa extrana rana parlante que ha hecho que el hechicero Morlock haya enviado a todos los soldados del principe Teodoro para capturarla? ¿Es una rana demonio, como el dice? ¿O quiza lo hace por otro motivo? La verdad se desvelara cuando Pitufina y los Pitufitos se encuentran con la rana. Ayudan a la rana a volver a transformarse en el principe Teodoro, que habia sido victima de un hechizo lanzado por Morlock.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Cada 500 anos, el Castillo Prision aparece y secuestra a inocentes viajeros. Abuelo Pitufo despega en su globo hacia el castillo, donde se encuentra con Nana Pitufa, que lleva desaparecida 500 anos. Tienen poco tiempo para escapar; de lo contrario, ¡se convertiran en invitados permanentes!

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.sub-title: La Tierra De Los Objetos Perdidos
programme.desc: Pitufo Fortachon, Pitufo Carpintero y Pitufo Filosofo pierden el telescopio de Papa Pitufo y Scour, el senor de los objetos perdidos, lo encuentra. Los Pitufos le dicen que darian cualquier cosa por recuperarlo, y Scour se apropia asi de sus posesiones mas preciadas: su fortaleza, su habilidad y su inteligencia. Entonces, viajan hasta sus dominios para recuperar lo que han perdido.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: El malvado brujo Nemesis aparece en la Biblioteca de los Magos para robar el conocimiento de los Archivos del Mal y hacerse con la Piedra de la Longevidad. Pero Pitufo Filosofo salva la situacion sin darse cuenta, ya que cambia el libro de cocina de Pitufo Goloso por el libro de hechizos de Papa Pitufo.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Pitufina y Nana Pitufa comparten casa y se sacan de quicio la una a la otra, asi que ha llegado el momento de que Nana Pitufa tenga su propia casa. Mientras Nana Pitufa y Pitufina salen en busca de una planta calienta hogares, los demas disenan la casa mas pitufantastica posible para ella.

programme.title: El Pitufofantasma
programme.desc: Guillermo se encuentra en el castillo de sus amigos Selwyn y Tallulah cuando el tio Fenwick, el amigable fantasma, le pide ayuda para atrapar a algunos parientes que le acechan. Guillermo acude a los Pitufos en busca de ayuda, y asi comienza una divertida persecucion...

programme.title: Minecraft, Roblox and More with Amy Lee
programme.desc: Hey Guys! I am Amy Lee! Welcome to my Channel! Check it out for videos on Minecraft, Roblox, The Sims plus oth

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! Follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game: 'Duel Monsters.'

programme.title: Roblox DOORS with Thinknoodles!
programme.desc: Thinknoodles plays Roblox Doors horror game in ROBLOX!

programme.title: Super Mario RPG
programme.desc: Enter a world of whimsy with Mario on a quest to repair Star Road and defeat the troublemaking Smithy Gang, who has crashed into their world and scattered the 7 Star Pieces of Star Road. Abdallah plays as Mario and teams up with a party of unlikely allies, like the monstrous Bowser and a mysterious doll named Geno, in Super Mario RPG on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic X
programme.desc: A slight malfunction causes Chaos Control, and sends Sonic the Hedgehog to Earth. While there, Sonic meets Chris Thorndyke, who helps in collecting the Chaos Emeralds, so Sonic and friends can go home.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder
programme.desc: Mario and friends are invited to the Flower Kingdom by its ruler, Prince Florian, when Bowser suddenly appears, along with Kamek and Bowser Jr.! Bowser then takes hold of the Wonder Flower, merging himself, his Koopa Clown Car, and Prince Florian's castle to become a flying fortress, wreaking havoc across the land and trapping the Poplins in their homes. Abdallah plays as Mario and friends and sets off on a journey to defeat Bowser and save the Flower Kingdom in Super Mario Bros. Wonder on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Sonic Superstars
programme.desc: Adventure through the mystical Northstar Islands and harness all-new Emerald powers to move and attack in dynamic new ways. Navigate gorgeous, never-before-seen environments and stop Dr. Eggman, Fang, and a mysterious new adversary from converting the islands' giant animals into Badniks before it's too late! Watch as Abdallah plays as Sonic and friends in Sonic Superstars on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Princess Peach: Showtime!
programme.desc: Princess Peach sets off to save the Sparkle Theater from Grape and the Sour Bunch. The guardian fairy of the Sparkle Theater, Stella, assists Peach by giving her usage of Sparkle power and allowing her to transform. Abdallah plays as Princess Peach in Princess Peach: Showtime! on Nintendo Switch with family-friendly commentary.

programme.title: Fitness
programme.desc: Discover how personal care is an essential part of your creative journey. Whether you're a seasoned crafter or a budding hobbyist, prioritize your well-being and find inspiration to fuel your passions.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Anything can happen in the world of make-believe. Jenny Barnett-Rohrs turns into a scary monster with a fun headband. Katie Hacker makes a fantasy tent and then whips up a never-ending cherry pie. Jenny shows how to create a show with puppets you make yourself from blogger Mom Carolina Moore.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Artists look at the world from fresh perspectives. Host Jenny Barnett-Rohrs draws the geometric patterns she sees looking at the world from high above. Franz Spohn has ideas for all the things artists can do besides creating works for a museum. Candie Cooper introduces us to the art form of Yamamoto to create a collage and Candie makes a 3-D color wheel.

programme.title: Drawing & Painting
programme.desc: Learn to draw and paint with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Short Rows
programme.desc: Learn knitting with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela is kicking off Season 7 of the Midnight Quilt Show with a redemption story. She’s made this Thistle quilt pattern before with half-square triangles but thinks this flying-geese version will be much easier to quilt.

programme.title: T-Shirt Quilt for Father's Day
programme.desc: Angela raids her husband's closet to stitch up a special quilted Father's Day gift. This T-shirt quilt for Jeremy isn't just any old T-shirt quilt; it's a very cool design that uses big flying geese to frame the blocks.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: In the final episode of the Holiday Gift-Along, your last-minute gift quilter, Angela Walters, is making a beginner-friendly criss cross quilt. This gift-able quilt project is much easier than it looks, so you still have time to make it before the holidays!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela shares her favorite way to make a quilt sandwich.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This practical and cute quilted zipper pouch is one of Angela's favorite projects yet, because it skips the piecing and gets straight to the quilting! In this episode, she shares three quilting designs every quilter should know: ribbon candy, serpentine lines and the paisley feather, while making a small, easy quilting project for beginners that only requires two fat quarters to make!

programme.title: Craft Hacks
programme.desc: Time-saving quick tips to feed your crafting craving.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: See the best episodes for learning jewelry making on CraftsyTV.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: We expand our view of classics by adding surface embellishments to personalize your garment. Cindy Hogan makes appliques from embroidery to add detail to any garment. Then, it's our next lesson in the Little Black Dress from Angela Wolf and different seam finishes including the Hong Kong. Last is embroidery expert Eileen Roche and easy dress embroidery for beautiful style.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Let your machine do all the work by adding embroidery. Reen Wilcoxson our expert on "in the hoop" designs make a cute baby bear lovey. Then, Angela Wolf finishes her jacket by adding beautiful embroidery patterns for a unique and timeless look.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.desc: Hold onto your needles! Tracie and Jodi, are here to dish out fresh fiber inspiration. From project picks to wooly good gossip, things are about to get super knitty… and maybe just a little nutty.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.sub-title: 11 Reasons You Should Knit Every Day
programme.desc: As if you needed more reasons to knit... The Grocery Girls are back with the 11 reasons you should be knitting every day, and some of them might surprise you!

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.sub-title: Knitting So Good You Never Want to End + Favorite Bind-Offs
programme.desc: Give your knitting the happy ending it deserves! In the season finale of Off Our Needles, Tracie and Jodi talk about the bind-offs they love and the projects they never wanted to end.

programme.title: Off Our Needles
programme.sub-title: T-Shirt Finishing Tips: Hems, Necklines + Weaving in Ends
programme.desc: So you’ve finished knitting your Novel-T, now what? Tune in to see how to weave in the ends when working with cotton yarn. Hint: this method involves fabric glue.

programme.title: Hands On Crafts for Kids
programme.desc: Give a new twist to traditional art forms. Jenny Barnett-Rohrs makes a trinket box inspired by a popular video game. Then, she makes a friendly turtle using the ancient art of mosaic. Candie Cooper creates pop art with polka dots in the style of the artist Kusama, and Jenny coils a rag basket with a touch of denim.

programme.title: Drawing & Painting
programme.desc: Learn to draw and paint with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Sink your teeth into current cake decorating trends! In the Man About Cake series, Joshua John Russell delivers incredible tips for creating modern edible masterpieces. Each week, he decorates an original cake, shares his favorite recipes and gives pointers for designing like a pro.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Watch JJR make ombré fondant ruffles and stud this cake with incredible custom "gems."

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: Joshua John Russell creates modern, edible masterpieces with cake, fondant and buttercream.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: No time to cure your sugar lace? Premade edible lace is the way to go (JJR treats his with airbrushing and a shabby chic design).

programme.title: Woodworkers Guild of America presented by CraftsyTV
programme.desc: Learn the ins and outs of glue with George Vondriska as he explains the differences between adhesives and when to use them in the shop. Find out which glues are best for your woodworking projects and which glues to avoid, then see how George recommends spreading your glue for the best consistency and clamping your materials to ensure proper bonding.

programme.title: Fresh Quilting
programme.desc: Less is often so much more. Minimalist quilt designer Nicole Neblett designs with negative space to achieve the modern aesthetic. Designer Luana Rubin shares inspirations from her world travels and lasting connections with quilters around the globe. Improv quilt artist Leslie Tucker Jenison cuts, pieces and sews curves without a ruler to create dynamic designs.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: In the final episode of the Holiday Gift-Along, your last-minute gift quilter, Angela Walters, is making a beginner-friendly criss cross quilt. This gift-able quilt project is much easier than it looks, so you still have time to make it before the holidays!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.sub-title: Bonus: Tips for Keeping Blocks Together
programme.desc: Angela shows how to keep everything in order to make piecing a breeze.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: This week's woven lattice quilt might look intricate, but it's actually perfect for beginners!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Your home reflects who you are. Using an easy smocking technique, sewing enthusiast Cheryl Sleboda makes colorful, patterned pillows to showcase her style. Blogger Heather Valentine combines unusual materials to create a handy caddy for her studio. With hand-dyed wool and nubby fibers, author Lisa Shepard Stewart stitches a lush wall-hanging.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Make a truly personal style statement. Embroidery expert Eileen Roche restyles a t-shirt with embroidery, then laces it up to create a boutique look. Designer Angela Wolf has a style tip for quickly updating a classic jacket. Educator Rebecca Kemp Brent uses basic computer fonts and a sewing machine to create beautiful monograms.

programme.title: Beads, Baubles & Jewels
programme.desc: Learn to create your own lampwork beads with swirls of color that are never repeated. Glass artist Tammy Rae Wolter shows how to form beads from glass and use them in creative ways for jewelry and accessories. Katie shows how to make coiled beads using colorful wire and crystal beads.

programme.title: Scrapbook Soup
programme.desc: Cutting has gotten very sophisticated – the newest tools allow us to do things we never thought possible. First, Jenny Barnett Rohrs demonstrates an inlaid die cutting technique to create card designs. Kazan Clark uses die cutting plus embossing to create straw toppers and more. Julie shares a last tip for transforming die cuts with a variety of techniques and tools, from doodles and stamps to markers and pens.

programme.title: Make It Artsy
programme.desc: Art is the spice of life! We explore different ways to add that special ingredient to daily life and many include a little glitz! Julie Fei Fan Balzer demonstrates 3 ways to add bling with stencils. Then, it's time for a little cold in the form of sweet treat art with a return visit from Jodi Ohl. We finish up with Candie Cooper and a little bling on a jean jacket.

programme.title: Knitting
programme.desc: Learn to knit with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Short Rows
programme.desc: Learn to knit with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Are you Quilt Curious, but unsure where to get started? THIS is the Midnight Quilt Show episode for you!

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Mistakes happen, even for the Midnight Quilter. But hey, the show must go on! Tune in to see how Angela conquers a little stitch snafu on her way to sewing a scrappy square-in-square stunner, just in time for her family reunion.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela creates a modern Southwestern-style quilt that's the perfect size to use as a blanket for summer picnics in the park.

programme.title: The Midnight Quilt Show
programme.desc: Angela is back! In addition to quilting an amazing half-square triangle quilt by Monique Dillard, she's also announcing something HUGE!

programme.title: Baking & Cooking
programme.desc: Learn to bake and cook with CraftsyTV.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Take it slow with this model railroad tour.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Take it slow with this model railroad tour.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy
programme.desc: Sewing experts offer easy ways to create neat sewing projects right at home. Viewers of all skill levels learn tips and techniques for creating professional-looking garments, personalized apparel and home accents. Weekly episodes feature various themes, and feature two main projects and one shorter technique segment. Some projects include monogramming napkins and towels; baby poncho, hooded towel and baby-friendly diapers; embellishing yoga pants with a clothing tattoo; and sewing on knits.

programme.title: Slow TV
programme.desc: Slow it down with cookie decorating.

programme.desc: Real cake artists paint with buttercream. Replicate the watercolor cake trend with these handy tips from the Man About Cake!

programme.desc: Joshua John Russell creates modern, edible masterpieces with cake, fondant and buttercream.

programme.title: Man About Cake
programme.desc: No piping? No problem. Check out JJR's cake hacks to make a faux piped royal icing cake accented with a sugar poppy.

programme.title: Fitness
programme.desc: Discover how personal care is an essential part of your creative journey. Whether you're a seasoned crafter or a budding hobbyist, prioritize your well-being and find inspiration to fuel your passions.
