programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia & Matt face skaters, Froy & Sonia repo from a volatile couple, & Lou & Froy take on backyard wrestlers.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck. Then, Froy and Lyndah confront a failed actor who has abandoned his dream and his responsibility for his car payments. Finally, it's death from above when Lou, Sonia and Matt try to repossess a vintage Caddy from a model plane enthusiast and his eccentric son.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: In this very special episode of Operation Repo, it's the 36 hours that change everything. When Matt, Froy, and Lyndah go on a routine repo gone violently wrong, the bonds that connect the Pizarro family may be torn apart forever.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia make their way to a home in the hills to clean a germaphobe of his car. Then, it's Matt and Froy's big repo. Having left the company to start their own, they head out after a high-end exotic car from outside a mansion. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Lou's cousin Rob drive out to a used car lot to pick up a few cars, but the owner has been hurt by the economy and now he's ready to do the hurting.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia have an order for a Jaguar behind a retail outlet center, but will the loaders let their precious car be loaded up without a fight? Then, Matt and Froy find themselves amidst a lover's quarrel when a disgruntled wife reveals that she stopped payment on her car because of her cheating husband. And finally, a debtor is nowhere to be found when Lou, Lyndah, and Rob head out to a seemingly quiet neighborhood. The silence is broken when the debtor finally shows up in another vehicle with bang!

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy end up on one of the weirdest repo's they've ever encountered when a white cargo van unleashes a wave of workers. Then, Lou, Sonia, and Rob go green when they find they learn the Mercedes Benz they are after has been converted to run on biodiesel. And finally, Matt and Froy can't seem to get a word in edgewise when they encounter a shrieking girl and her biker boyfriend who claim their Mercedes was paid in full. Little do our guys know that she was right all along.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent. And, with Matt and Froy's business in a complete shambles, they go to work in the only place that can save them Tijuana.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy continue their risky run in Tijuana, confronting a strip club owner who keeps a tight grip on his vehicle and his employees. Then, Lou and Cousin Rob are in a case of he said- she said when a seductive young debtor calls in the police with claims of some inappropriate behavior. Finally, the whole Pizarro family heads to an illegal street race to get their just desserts from the man who had previously hit Lyndah with his truck, but at what cost does revenge come?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job when a debtor makes shocking claims to police about the newest member of the Pizarro clan. Plus, will a repossession from a well-connected socialite end with Matt and Froy riding into the sunset, or is somebody going to end up locked in a Mexican prison?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After Froy bails him out from a Tijuana prison, Matt is on the warpath, and somebody needs to pay. Is this just the end of their business, or is it also the end of their friendship? Then, Lou and Sonia get an order for a typical vehicle repossession. There's only one problem: it belongs to somebody who is like family to them.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The repo team is back! On the premiere episode of the summer season of Operation Repo, Lou, Matt, Sonia, Froy, and Lyndah are back together and better than ever...although a secret meeting suggests trouble in paradise. This week, the team confronts a shady import/export warehouse filled with unpaid-for cars, a pair of reckless rodeo gals, and a cunning team of car thieves who don't even think twice before running off with the team's truck.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After recovering their stolen truck, the reunited repo team is on pins and needles to hold their shaky alliance together.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou faces the toughest loss of his career. First, the team repossesses a truck from a pair of larger-than-life debtors with a passion for exotic sports, then they grapple with a gaggle of drunken partiers who don't want to give up their tricked-out bus, and, Lou and Matt track a debtor to a junkyard.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The destruction of the repo team's truck has left the future of the company in the balance, but Matt's got a trick up his sleeve that might keep them afloat. Lou and Sonia head to a dark alley to take a van away from a pair of libidinous teens with a dark secret, Sonia and Froy come face to face with the world's most ornery baker and come away a little worse for wear, and Matt and Froy get in way over their heads when they attempt a repo at a high-octane truck racing track.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Now that Lou has accepted Matt's offer to buy into the company, the team is back in action, but there are still some unanswered questions. Sonia, Lyndah, and Froy interrupt a rich kid's brunch party to take away his ride, Matt and Lyndah attempt to repo an unusual vehicle from a man who thinks he's Uncle Sam, and Lou and Matt are in a losing match with an unruly gang of jacked-up rugby players.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Armed with the belief that he is now co-owner of the business, Matt starts making some big business calls - is this the beginning of a new chapter for the team, or the beginning of its undoing?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The confusion over Lou's new business relationship with Matt continues to mount.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The repo team's new truck finally arrives, and with it, a new chapter in the building feud between Team Lou and Team Matt.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Froy is seriously injured on a routine repo, the building confrontation between Lou and Matt continues to escalate.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou's new business relationship with Matt starts to unravel when a botched job puts a serious strain on the company.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: A new rift between Matt and the rest of the crew puts the fate of the team in question.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: On this season finale, Matt and Lou have their final confrontation and the team loses a member.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: On this season premiere, Sonia's rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia's recovery takes another unexpected turn when she goes too far with a debtor.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Things get a lot more complicated for the team when Sonia puts herself on the business end of a knife.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The repo team confronts the toughest challenge yet: one-on-one interviews with an anger management specialist.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team's work with the anger management specialist starts to pay off with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy crash a meeting to ask for a car, but instead they get an angry old man with a rifle.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy interrupt a debtor and two maids who are getting hands-on with their job. A confrontation with construction workers goes bad, and somebody's vehicle will get destroyed.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou, Sonia repo from yuppie; Sonia, Matt, Froy reclaim from hippie; Matt, Sonia confront fire dancers.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy show off their best moves against a team of dance instructors who will stop at nothing to hold onto their car. Matt and Sonia repossess a vehicle from a woman with the world's most vindictive boyfriend. Lou and Froy match muscle, wits with a gang of vicious roadies.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia are caught in a desperate situation when the owner of their target car is struck by a heart attack. Plus, a repo becomes violent under the watchful eye of the finance company.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou find themselves in the middle of nowhere in a tooth-and-nail fight with a trio of nerdy stargazers, Froy and Sonia find a cooperative old man to be a hassle after agreeing to let him get his stuff out of his cluttered car, and Lou and Matt go on a repo to interrupt a shady car sale and find themselves caught in the middle of an elaborate police sting operation.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia are overwhelmed by a swarm of cheerleaders; Matt and Froy interrupt a father and son bonding session gone wrong; the team heads to the raceway to prove they still have what it takes.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo an airplane, but Froy finds himself in handcuffs when Lou takes off. Matt joins Sonia on a repo from a pole dancing studio, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy repo a car from a girl whose roommate has been keeping two very big secrets. Sonia and Froy's repo from a creepy husband reveals some incriminating evidence to his wife, and when Lou and Sonia can't locate their target car, Lou comes up with a master plan that requires some back-up

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: While attempting a repo of a "green energy" bio-diesel vehicle, Froy's (Froylan Tercero) lack of knowledge of the vehicle's specialized fuel system sets the bus ablaze... and when his error causes it to explode, he and Matt (Matt Burch) abandon builders/owners Mickie (Michael Q. Schmidt) and Joey (Gino Calabro) in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Matt go to a garden center to repo a forklift, but a language barrier causes chaos. Matt and Froy are in danger when Froy refuses to call the cops on a gun-wielding debtor.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: With the pressure of Froy's legal problems mounting, the team does everything they can to convince him to hire a lawyer. Froy and Matt confront a misogynist frat boy with a dark secret, Sonia and Froy wrangle with a squadron of costumed rally racers, and Lou, Matt, and Froy get the surprise of a lifetime when they're faced with a truck-full of vicious gangsters.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret. And finally, the team's attempt to repo fifteen bikes from a gym is not the morale booster Lou had hoped for.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: While Froy waits on news from his lawyer about his warrant in Texas, he considers taking matters into his own hands. Lou and Froy bust some slick moves in an attempt to wrangle a car from a debtor who is prepared to battle. Then, when one woman behaves like a child, Matt puts her in timeout, but worries he may have gone too far. And finally, Lou, Matt, and Froy take on an jealous husband with deadly aim.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy head to Texas to clear Froy's name, but things take a turn for the worse and Froy finds himself in more trouble than he can handle. Back in LA, Lou and Lyndah repo a car from a deceptive charity worker, and Lou is left to protect the girls from two knife wielding debtors who will go to any lengths to keep their vehicles.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Down in Texas, Matt and Froy are staking out a cement mixer, but their repo turns disastrous when an innocent bystander gets showered in concrete. In LA, Frankie takes the reins with an alcoholic debtor, and Lou and Sonia deal with a diva who pushes Sonia to her breaking point.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.sub-title: Couple of Yups/Bottled Feelings/A Screw Loose
programme.desc: First, Frankie and Lyndah find themselves in a fancy neighborhood, dealing with a pair of uptight yuppies with well-coordinated clothes and well-coordinated attacks. Then Lyndah goes wild when a truck-driving debtor gets physical with Sonia. And finally, Matt and Froy face down a backwoods Texan with secret ammunition.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy face incredible odds against a Texas-sized biker gang looking for a beat down, and when bullets fly, it starts to look like they may never come back home. Back in LA, Frankie's wild antics jeopardize a repo and push Lyndah to her breaking point.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Matt and Froy set out to repo a truck from a wealthy Texan, but their mission backfires when the Sheriff arrives with a new arrest warrant that will send Froy away for good.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou takes his new guys on their very first repo but, when the debtors attack with chainsaws, Ronnie and Carlos are left to fend for themselves.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou plans an elaborate sting operation to infiltrate a cult, but everything goes awry when the new guys aren't prepared and Matt is left picking up the pieces.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia repo from a stranded motorist who rallies the neighborhood around his cause and incites a full on revolt. Ronnie and Carlos set out on their first unsupervised repo, but their desire to impress is quickly derailed when an erratic debtor lets loose with pepper spray.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect? Sonia and Lyndah confront a gang of roller derby girls who've got the skills to protect their car.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Carlos put their best performance in when they attempt to repossess a vehicle from a pair of silver-painted robot men.? Matt and Froy need a second opinion when they run into a debtor with a questionable claim about a life-threatening illness.?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Matt have to wrangle with some angry clowns when they try to repossess a bouncy castle. Meanwhile, Lou and Sonia lose patience with a debtor over a recycling truck.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Carlos plays a repossession prank that almost lands Matt and Froy in jail, Lou tasks Froy with burying the hatchet.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy deal with an unbalanced debtor who threatens to take down the entire company, while Matt and Ronnie take on children's book vendors who are up to no good.

programme.title: HealthDay
programme.desc: The president of the American College of Cardiology joins us to discuss how heart disease is the leading cause of death in American women, and how different factors and treatments can lower or worsen your risk of cardiovascular disease.

programme.title: HealthDay
programme.sub-title: Why Are Allergies Getting Worse Every Year?
programme.desc: Medical experts meet to discuss seasonal allergies and why each spring brings more intense allergy symptoms than the last.

programme.title: HealthDay
programme.desc: We’re joined by the former chief of staff at the CDC to discuss what the agency learned during the COVID-19 pandemic and how it plans to move forward. We’ll also take a look at the long-term effects of COVID and how you can boost your vaccine’s effectiveness even further.

programme.title: HealthDay
programme.desc: We’re joined by the president and CEO of March of Dimes to discuss the risks that pregnant women — particularly women of color — still face in the United States.

programme.title: HealthDay
programme.sub-title: The Future of Mental Health Treatment
programme.desc: In this episode, we take a look at the mental health benefits of healthy eating and exercising and explore the future of depression treatment, while debunking popular myths about causes and cures for depression.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series
programme.sub-title: Yoga Is - Day 30 Freedom Simple Bridge / Urdhva Dhanurasana
programme.desc: Day 30 of our challenge is built around Bridge Pose, a simple backbend.

programme.title: OmStars- Yoga Is Series
programme.sub-title: Yoga Is - Day 31 Home Padmasana/Seated Pose
programme.desc: We’ll use the seated pose Padmasana to explore what it means to be happy, peaceful and spiritually at home in your own skin.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy
programme.sub-title: Good Morning Joy - Speaking with the Heart
programme.desc: Dr. Heather Browne is a master at transforming conversations between couples. She shares how she helps couples bridge divides and cultivate more fulfilling relationships. Plus, we are back in India chatting with some cute kids and sharing good news.

programme.title: Good Morning Joy
programme.sub-title: Good Morning Joy - Unleash Your Inner Warrior
programme.desc: Hollywood star, Sean Kanan, helps you unleash your inner warrior and change your life with his new book. We head to Rochester, NY, for a party that has been 46 years in the making. And we go international with inspiring conversations from India and Italy!

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.sub-title: The Aware Show: Cynthia James - Does Your Voice Matter?
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Cynthia James. Known as a Champion of Change, she is a best-selling author, speaker, transformational coach, and spiritual leader. Today she discusses the importance of using your voice and how it takes great courage to step out and state your beliefs. She talks about what it means to be connected as one human family. Her latest book is, Does My Voice Matter? – A Journey of Self-Discovery, Authenticity, and Empowerment.

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.sub-title: The Aware Show: Dr. Beth McDougall - Achieving Optimal Health
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr Beth McDougall who has been transforming the practice of medicine by bringing innovative therapeutics to thousands of patients for more than two decades. Long known as a medical detective, she is contributing to an emerging medical paradigm in which medicine and physics intersect. She describes health in the context of our relationship to the Unified Field -- a continuous field of infinite energy and information from which all matter and life emerges.

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.sub-title: The Aware Show: Dr. Bernard Beitman - Meaningful Coincidences
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr. Bernard Beitman, often called the King of Coincidences. Dr Beitman is the first psychiatrist since Carl Jung to systematize the study of coincidences. A graduate of Yale Medical School, he did his psychiatric residency at Stanford University. His latest book is Meaningful Coincidences: How and Why Synchronicity and Serendipity Happen.

programme.title: The Aware Show
programme.sub-title: The Aware Show: Marc H Morgenstern - The Soul of the Deal
programme.desc: Host Lisa Garr interviews Marc H. Morgenstern who has taught Street Smart Startups at UC Berkeley. He's a veteran dealmaker and entrepreneur with billions of dollars of buying, selling, and financing innovative and disruptive businesses. He's a longtime board member of The Rex Foundation, the non-profit founded by the Grateful Dead. He talks about the similarities of attending a Dead show, and making a shrewd business deal. His latest book is The Soul of the Deal.

programme.title: The Secrets of the Keys
programme.desc: Elizabeth comes face-to-face with her spiritual guide, Gwen who has an intriguing opportunity for her.

programme.title: The Wright Turn
programme.sub-title: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: La Dolce Vita (Sweet Life) - Ten years after the divorce from Maxwell Turner, with children grown, Celeste Wright Turner makes a choice to start living her life. No SEX with the EX! Simon and Mimi try to get Celeste’s head on straight when it comes to Maxwell’s charm. After facing an emotional challenge, Celeste decides to take a trip abroad.

programme.title: The Wright Turn
programme.sub-title: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
programme.desc: London Bridges Burning Down - Breakdowns are inevitable when Celeste tries to run from her past. Her therapist gives Celeste sound advice on how to spice up her sex life.

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators
programme.desc: Sharon Lechter, with cameo appearances by John Assaraf, Lisa Nichols, Dr.Rev Michael Beckwith, Shanda Sumpter, David Meltzer and emcee, Paisley Demby.

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators
programme.desc: Brian Tracy, with cameo appearance by Erik Swanson, interviewer.

programme.title: The Wright Turn
programme.sub-title: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
programme.desc: Butter Me Up - Celeste returns back to Los Angeles after her journey. Her friends throw her a sex toy birthday party. When an old flame comes back, can he melt her butter? Nikki reveals a trauma from her childhood.

programme.title: The Inspiration Show
programme.sub-title: Using Mindfulness to Erase Negative Habits With Dawa Tarchin Phillips
programme.desc: Dawa explores whether your mind controls you or you control your mind, as well as, how mindfulness can erase negative thinking and bad habits.

programme.title: The Inspiration Show
programme.sub-title: How To Find Spiritual Fulfillment with Kevin Hancock
programme.desc: Kevin shares how he went from a stressed executive to a spiritually-fulfilled leader, and the unique and inspiring force that led him to his there.

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators
programme.desc: Sharon Lechter, with cameo appearances by John Assaraf, Lisa Nichols, Dr.Rev Michael Beckwith, Shanda Sumpter, David Meltzer and emcee, Paisley Demby.

programme.title: World’s Greatest Motivators
programme.desc: Brian Tracy, with cameo appearance by Erik Swanson, interviewer.

programme.title: Sex Talk
programme.sub-title: Sex Talk - The Truth About Aphrodisiacs
programme.desc: Are aphrodisiacs really a love potion? And the experts weigh in on the science of sex addiction. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.

programme.title: Sex Talk
programme.sub-title: Sex Talk - Beware of Casual Sex on Vacation
programme.desc: Self-confidence is sexy, but how do you get it? Plus, what happens in Vegas doesn't stay in Vegas. Avoiding sexually transmitted infections after casual sex on vacation. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.

programme.title: Smart Life
programme.desc: Reducing Cardiovascular Risks with Dr. Jonathan Fialkow, Ask the Expert with Dr. Ricardo Castrellon, Cancer Fatigue & Exercise with Ginelle Ruffa

programme.title: Smart Life
programme.desc: Physical Activity & Kids with Dr. Scarlet Constant, Avoiding Childhood Obesity with Dr. Scarlet Constant

programme.title: Smart Life
programme.desc: Women and Heart Disease with Dr. Frederick Chaleff, Car Seat Proper Setting with Lt. Tony Armijo, Bad Breath with Dr. Jorge Blanco

programme.title: Smart Life
programme.desc: Hand Arthritis with Dr. Elizabeth Ouellette, Occupational Therapy Services with Vickie Zamora

programme.title: Smart Life
programme.desc: Ask the Expert Segment with Dr. Ileana Perez-Quintairos, An Alternative to Facelift with Dr. John Martin, What is Alzheimer's? with Michael Pearson, Alzheimer's Association

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.sub-title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E1
programme.desc: HOPE IS HERE features inspiring and uplifting, relevant and refreshing, personal stories told by cancer survivors, their families, and the loved ones of those who lost the fight against this “emperor of all maladies” and sparked a movement that gives added meaning to their lives. Their moving stories show how the light of hope is salvaged from depths of despair.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.sub-title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E2
programme.desc: Lung cancer diagnoses for young, non-smoking individuals are a growing trend. But that didn't intimidate the athletic and courageous lung cancer patient, 21-year-old Jill Costello. Jill's fighting spirit and her desire to help find a cure and eradicate the stigma that only smokers contracted the disease would eventually define her legacy.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.sub-title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E3
programme.desc: Hank Baskett was given the grim diagnosis of stage 4 lung cancer almost ten years ago. At the time his thoughts were not of himself but of how he was going to tell his family. In episode 3 of Hope is Here we meet Hank and his family and learn how he was able to push forward towards health with a hopeful attitude and mission that his cancer journey would be, in his words, a joyful one.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.sub-title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E4
programme.desc: Gina Hollenbeck is positive about life. Every day she lives with an optimistic desire to overcome and thrive despite a stage 4 lung cancer diagnosis. As a young mother of two boys, she forges ahead towards a vibrant and meaningful journey with a mission to help find a cure for not only herself but for others who suffer from this deadly disease.

programme.title: Hope Is Here
programme.sub-title: Health Day - Hope Is Here S1E5
programme.desc: Emily Bennett Taylor and her husband Miles were newlyweds with a bright future planned. Just as they were house hunting and talking about raising a family Emily received the news that she had stage 4 lung cancer. She and her husband recall their cancer journey and recount their determination to live life to its fullest while fighting for the chance to have children despite a grave cancer diagnosis.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your day 3 practice invites you to get to know your body through the structure of the practice and the art of aligning. We build on day 1 and 2 with a focus on action and alignment through asana and energy.

programme.title: Weight Loss Master Class
programme.sub-title: Weight Loss Master Class - This Is Why You 'Can’t Lose Weight'
programme.desc: The media tells you, 'Don’t worry! You’re big and you’re beautiful.' That you are healthy at any size. Nice to hear, but it simply isn’t true. Pharma companies and many in the medical community are now going to tell you it’s genetic — a disease of the brain that results in an insatiable hunger. They do this because surgeries and weight loss drugs are profitable. In this lesson, we will address these issues one by one.

programme.title: Weight Loss Master Class
programme.sub-title: Weight Loss Master Class - Calories: Everything You Need to Know
programme.desc: Let’s use a quick analogy: If your body is a car, then reverse is actively gaining weight, neutral is not gaining or losing, and drive is weight loss… Ultimately you have been eating more than you are burning, which is what put the weight on in the first place. By controlling the calories in, we generally shift the car from reverse to neutral. No longer gaining, but not really losing a ton. By adding exercise into the mix we throw the car into drive without compromising your metabolism or muscle mass.

programme.title: Weight Loss Master Class
programme.sub-title: Weight Loss Master Class - Body Fat: Why and How It Accumulates in Excess and What We Can Do About It
programme.desc: This lesson is the 101 on all things 'body fat' — what it actually is, what it does in and for the body, and what is considered a healthy body fat percentage. And, most importantly – for your purposes – how does it build up or, rather, get stored in the body and, conversely, how does it get released or “burned” off? Don’t worry, we aren’t going down a biochemistry rabbit hole here. These are just the must-know essentials.

programme.title: Gut Health with Dr. Mary Pardee
programme.desc: Over the course of the next 10 days, you're going to get the full scoop on, well, poop but plenty more such as the role that our nutrition, nervous system, and hormones play in our gut health. What happens in the gut does not stay in the gut, and we will discuss how important the gut-brain connection is for our health and wellness optimization.

programme.title: Gut Health with Dr. Mary Pardee
programme.desc: For day 2, we'll look at the connection between the gut and the brain. We'll also practice mindful eating.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your Day 1 practice offers an invitation to slow down and take stock.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your Day 2 session invites you to use the tools of the at-home yoga practice to befriend your body and your breath. Build on the art of noticing from Day 1 as we expand our vocabulary with a focus on a strong foundation. This session encourages a healthy flow of energy up and down the spine and lovingly guides you to learn how to take responsibility for your experience on the mat.

programme.title: Yoga For All
programme.desc: Your day 3 practice invites you to get to know your body through the structure of the practice and the art of aligning. We build on day 1 and 2 with a focus on action and alignment through asana and energy.

programme.title: The Emerging Science of Longevity
programme.sub-title: The Emerging Science of Longevity: Secrets to Healthy Aging
programme.desc: The body has inherent systems to slow and even reverse aging. When you activate these systems you increase stem cell production, reduce inflammation, increase antioxidant enzymes, build muscle, lose fat, and increase cognitive capacity.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.sub-title: Relationships: Relationships and Your Spiritual Journey
programme.desc: Today's lesson is a bit of a reality check, as we'll begin to question the current way we look at relationships, romantic or not. How we see ourselves and our relationship to God influences our view of our relationships with other people. Today we're going to examine that view from a place of love.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.desc: In the following lesson, we'll discover how the ego mind influences both our way of thinking and our relationships. We'll also identify the unconscious barriers we've built that cause us to form these judgments and thoughts. That's where the problem is, and that's where the solution lies.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.sub-title: Relationships: How to Have Miraculous Relationships
programme.desc: A miracle happens when you stop thinking with fear and start thinking with love. Your greatest power lies in your mind. To establish stronger connections, you need to go into every situation requesting to be an instrument of love. When you approach your interactions with love, you'll begin to have more miraculous relationships.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.sub-title: Relationships: Relationships Are Opportunities for Growth
programme.desc: The focus of today's lecture is this: atonement. While we decided to act a certain way in the past based on our personality, we can now use this information to improve our current and future relationships.

programme.title: Relationships with Marianne Williamson
programme.desc: To truly grasp the concept of forgiveness, we have to be willing to see past the person's mistakes. The benefit we get from being more forgiving isn't that other people are going to be more forgiving towards us, it's that it won't affect us when they aren't.

programme.title: The Emerging Science of Longevity

programme.title: Gut Health with Dr. Mary Pardee
programme.desc: For day 4, we learn about common GI disorders and how to test for them.

programme.title: Grounding Into Grace
programme.desc: Learning to bear weight intelligently and safely on the hands is a requirement for a sustainable vinyasa yoga practice. This class offers wrist-care strategies and a fair amount of forearm work so that you can enjoy vinyasa for life. Prepare for a bit of burn and the pleasure of learning to be a graceful quadruped.

programme.title: Grounding Into Grace
programme.desc: You can ground down through your hips even if they aren't on the floor! You'll want to pad up your knees for this kneeling-based vinyasa sequence that targets the quads and glutes. You will find that this class may challenge your balance, but it will leave you sore in all the right places. Close class with hip opening and a guided breath practice to restore the nervous system.

programme.title: Grounding Into Grace
programme.desc: One way to keep from overdoing weightbearing on the wrists in vinyasa style yoga is to shift to the forearms. But grounding into your forearms requires extra mobility and strength in the shoulders, triceps and core — so get ready to warm up fast! This class flows through various forms of forearm plank balanced with sweet shoulder opening for a satisfying blend of effort and release. Forearms FTW!

programme.title: Gut Health with Dr. Mary Pardee
programme.desc: Over the course of the next 10 days, you're going to get the full scoop on, well, poop but plenty more such as the role that our nutrition, nervous system, and hormones play in our gut health. programme.title: Gut Health with Dr. Mary Pardee
programme.sub-title: Day 3: IBS and other Gastrointestinal Issues
programme.desc: Today, we dive into the most commonly diagnosed functional GI disorder, Irritable Bowel Syndrome (IBS)

programme.title: Gut Health with Dr. Mary Pardee
programme.desc: For day 4, we learn about common GI disorders and how to test for them.

programme.title: Peace of Mind Parenting
programme.sub-title: Peace of Mind Parenting - Day 1: Positive Parenting in a Pandemic
programme.desc: Today, you'll learn solutions to this work, life, and parenting balancing problem many of us are experiencing during this pandemic. You're never going to be perfectly in balance, particularly during this time. But you’ll learn how to be aligned with your goals, values, and intentions.

programme.title: Peace of Mind Parenting
programme.sub-title: Peace of Mind Parenting - Day 2: What to Do When Your Child is Stressed
programme.desc: Today, we shift our thinking. We view these behaviors not as a problem but as communication. Your child’s behavior is actually communication. They're communicating to you that they are stressed. When we tune into their behavior with this in mind, our perspective changes and we learn to lean in with empathy.

programme.title: Peace of Mind Parenting
programme.sub-title: Peace of Mind Parenting - Day 4: Judgement vs. Curiosity
programme.desc: Today’s lesson is all about getting curious about the context for why we make certain parenting decisions and better understanding where our judgments may be coming from so we can release them.

programme.title: A Strong & Stable Spine
programme.desc: The oblique sling includes the internal and external obliques. This X pattern along the front and sides of our abdominal wall is an integral component of functional movement patterns. Stability in this area should precede all other movements. If we do not have it, our movements will be compromised. Most of us have too much strength in our back and not enough in our front and sides. This class serves as a remedy. Let's go.

programme.title: A Strong & Stable Spine
programme.desc: This class primarily focuses on increasing the flexibility and suppleness of your cervical spine (the top 7 vertebrae, otherwise known as your neck). We tend to neglect the neck when we practice/train. It has the tendency to be stiff and weak. So, before we practice some strength building mobility work in the next class, let's stretch it out and create some more space in the areas that tend to hold tension. Get your strap out and get ready for some yummy, feel-good stretches that lengthen the tissues of your neck in 360 degrees.

programme.title: A Strong & Stable Spine
programme.desc: Now that we've stretched out our necks and created some space in this area, let's add some mobility work to the mix. Most of us tend to focus on strengthening bigger muscles and more obvious joints like our shoulders and hips, and our neck tends to get left out and neglected. This class is all about strengthening the neck in 360 degrees.

programme.title: A Strong & Stable Spine
programme.desc: A strong stable core is truly the foundation for proper movement mechanics. Most of us are stuck in spinal extension. Our ribs flare out and our lower back is overly compressed. We need to learn how to access our abdominal muscles through articulating our spine into flexion. Here's a class that will toughen up your abdominal muscles, and teach you how to flex and segment your spine efficiently.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We’ve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan’s Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We’re in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We’ve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They’re going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other’s strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world’s strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland, after 3 events the Polish Strongman Oskar Ziolkowski is Leading. Kelvin, Travis and Aivars are coming up and will try to beat him, but will Oskar take his first title ever?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: it’s been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let’s see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It’s an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. There’s only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, there’s going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkey’s south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season of Strongman Champions League. Here in the sunshine, we’ll finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is. You could not ask for a better setting. After months of hard-work, if not years for some of these lads, we find out who will take the world title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. It’s all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2023 Strongman Champions League in Vaasa, Finland! This year’s event introduces a knockout format with 6 intense events over 90 minutes, ending in a unique deadlift face-off with boats.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stage 2 of the Strongman Champions League 2023 is set in Zrenjanin, Serbia. This exciting event features 5 challenging contests, including a superhuman Yoke race. As the SCL World Series Tour continues, athletes will battle it out to claim the yellow leader’s position for the season. Don’t miss this incredible stage of strength and endurance!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World
programme.desc: The World’s Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we’ve picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they’ll be going all out against each other. It’s now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let’s start the action.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it’s the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it’s about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World’s Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn’t compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts; it’s the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it’s going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don’t, this is strongman champions league.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking
programme.desc: On the menu this week it’s medieval madness, we’ve come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world’s strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it’s explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I’m shaking because it’s Poland, it’s powerful, it’s strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it’s about to get heavy.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Be Real
programme.sub-title: "Positive Power of Social Media | Kayla Nevius"
programme.desc: Join us in our latest Be Real, as we delve into the inspiring journey of Kayla Nevius, a passionate fisherman and hunter from a small town in California. Through the lens of social media, Kayla has not only shared her love for the outdoors but has also built a thriving community of like-minded women. - Despite the challenges of living in a small town, Kayla has leveraged platforms like Instagram and YouTube to connect with others who share her passions. Through her engaging content and positive attitude, she has created a space where women can come together to learn, share, and inspire one another.

programme.title: Be Real
programme.desc: We delve into the incredible story of Melissa Bachman, a true embodiment of resilience and tenacity. Having faced rejection over 70 times in her pursuit of a career in the outdoor industry, Melissa's journey is a testament to the power of unwavering determination. - Whether you're an avid outdoorsman's or not, Melissa Bachman's story is bound to leave you inspired and motivated to overcome any obstacle in your own journey. - Melissa bet on herself and came out of top.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Melissa Bachman has made her name over the last two decades as one of the most dedicated hunters and producers in the outdoor industry. In this episode we’ll tag along with Melissa while she chases big game around the world with her Winchester in hand. First we’ll head to Colorado as Melissa spot and stalks giant mule deer, then we’ll head across the pond to New Zealand to chase mountain ibex and tar, then head back to the states for Montana whitetail at ground level.

programme.title: Silver Kings
programme.desc: Capt. Jared Raskob is joined by Canadian Fly Fishing Guide Paula Shearer on a keys quest for a big tarpon.

programme.title: Island Hopping: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Adventure seeker Christina Wilson joins locals to dive aquamarine waters, paddle the remote backcountry, and indulge in fresh cuisine from hideaway eateries along the unique islands that make up the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Black Cloud
programme.desc: Friends from DSG Outerwear, Wendy Gavinski, Rachelle Hedrick, Kaitlin Bowen and Jennifer Homa meet up with the Black Cloud crew to duck hunt opening day in Louisiana.

programme.title: Black Cloud
programme.sub-title: "An All-Nighter for a Duck Hunt? | Oklahoma Mixed Bag of Ducks | "
programme.desc: The guys stay up all night while driving from Canada to catch a duck hunt in Oklahoma. Are they crazy? - We've taken you on plenty of Oklahoma timber duck hunts in the past, but the state is also known for plains duck hunting as well. The northwestern corner of the state is a bit different, and the guys oftentimes hunt small cattle ponds, creeks, and sometimes puddles. Regardless, they usually kill species such as mallards, pintails, widgeons, and gadwalls. Here's the latest from the Sooner state.

programme.title: Black Cloud
programme.desc: Black Cloud joins The Fowl Life TV at WyoBraska Outfitters. Chad Belding and his team take us along as they hunt Canadian Geese in the Great Plains.

programme.title: Black Cloud
programme.desc: The Black Cloud crew takes you to Alberta for an epic Canada Duck Hunt. Watch as Chad Belding and his crew scout and hunt dry field mallards.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Every season, just like clockwork, mission-driven longboards gobble their way across the plains of South Dakota, the cornfields of Iowa, the timbered ridges of Michigan and the cattle ground of Kansas looking for their soulmates in one of the most celebrated hunting seasons in America…the wild turkey breeding season. Join Team Winchester as they stalk, call, flank and roost boss gobblers into range from coast to coast.

programme.title: The Journey Within
programme.desc: Mark Peterson continues his quest in New Zealand going after the Wingshooting Slam. On the first two days of the hunt, he was able to cross off the turkey, quail, and peacock on his list. It's now opening day of waterfowl and Mark will be spending the day on a small pond close to the coast. With the limit being 50 birds per person, Mark plans to put the Benelli shotgun to work and cross a few more birds off his Wingshooting Slam.

programme.title: AFTCO Original Film
programme.desc: It disappeared for generations and seasons on end, only to return again. This time, rivaling the golden era of the past. Explore the history of the beginning of sportfishing and how it has influenced the most prestigious anglers in Southern California.

programme.title: Hunting Land Man
programme.desc: In this episode we take you behind the scenes of production for one of the biggest and baddest listings Slade has ever gotten - Southside Land Company in Jefferson County, MS. Hunter Phelps comes down from Kentucky to help film, and Slade puts him on 2 Mississippi gobblers.
Tarif Alkhatibs is new to Team200, but no stranger to killing some - of the biggest free range whitetails in his home state of Texas – - including the state record typical!

programme.title: The Hunted Land & Sea
programme.desc: Gerry Holland reflects on his first trip to Africa with Kristian and Kim Hansen. Expecting the unexpected on a trip around the world with tumbling bullets and lethal snakes.
Joe Miles – Owner of Asio Gear, chases big whitetails in Kentucky, Kansas and Mexico!

programme.title: Turkey Posse
programme.desc: Lachlan Weber experiences a full day of unstoppable turkey hunting action during opening day of Wisconsin’s youth season. After multiple close calls, a shot opportunity finally surfaces on the second day but things quickly go sideways. Quit or keep pressing? It’s a tough decision for the POSSE, but the turkey gods have spoken.

programme.title: Browning Films
programme.desc: Brothers Kyle Barefield from All Things Hunting and Ken Barefield from Cobra Kai team up to go on a South West Texas adventure hunt looking for two 30 inch plus Aoudad rams while battling the summertime Western heat.

programme.title: HuntStand Presents
programme.desc: After several years of shifting focus back to his native whitetails, Dahlke returns to mule deer country with the Muley Freak, Erik Van Woerkom. Follow along on this Utah mule deer hunt.

programme.title: The Huntsman
programme.sub-title: "Australian Fallow deer hunt & ultimate thermal shooting technology"
programme.desc: Join Chris Waters and his hunting companions, Michael and Habeeb, on an adrenaline-fueled adventure deep in the heart of New South Wales, Australia. In this thrilling episode of 'The Huntsman', we embark on a mission to assist local farmers by managing fallow deer populations and targeting pesky foxes wreaking havoc on their land. - Armed with cutting-edge thermal hunting technology, Michael unveils the latest in pest control innovation, providing a firsthand demonstration of its effectiveness in the field. As day turns to night, the hunt intensifies under the glow of thermal imaging, offering a unique perspective on the challenges of nocturnal hunting. - Experience the rush as we navigate the rugged terrain, strategizing our approach to outsmart elusive prey. From stalking majestic fallow deer to swiftly dispatching cunning foxes, every moment is packed with suspense and action. - Join us on this epic journey as we showcase the thrill of responsible hunting and the importance of wildlife management in preserving Australia's natural ecosystems. Don't miss out on this unforgettable adventure filled with camaraderie, excitement, and unforgettable moments.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: On opening day of Missouri’s gun season, hunters from around the state seek ridges and box blinds throughout the “Show Me” state in search of mature whitetail bucks. For Nikki Boxler and the Winchester Deer Camp, it’s no different. With Winchester’s in hand, Nikki and crew play cat and mouse with several mature bucks at Indian Hill Outfitters in Pike County.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Every season, just like clockwork, mission-driven longboards gobble their way across the plains of South Dakota, the cornfields of Iowa, the timbered ridges of Michigan and the cattle ground of Kansas looking for their soulmates in one of the most celebrated hunting seasons in America…the wild turkey breeding season. Join Team Winchester as they stalk, call, flank and roost boss gobblers into range from coast to coast.

programme.title: Winchester Life
programme.desc: Everything is bigger in Texas, including the stories. With the whitetail rut in the midwest winding down, the Winchester Life Crew of Chris Keefer, Casey Keefer, Nikki Boxler and Paul Sawyer head south to the Texas Panhandle with Winchesters in hand hoping to wrangle in a few Texas-sized giants.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting
programme.desc: On his annual hunt to Eastern Wyoming, Editor-in-Chief Dan Schmidt faces uncontrollable arrow deflections that put his experience as a bowhunter to the test.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting
programme.desc: In Texas, outdoor writer Brad Fenson assesses whether or not the moon phase has an impact on his whitetail hunt where the big bucks seem to be sticking to nighttime movement.

programme.title: Deer and Deer Hunting
programme.desc: Dan Schmidt struggles with freezing Nebraska temperatures on a whitetail rut hunt in the Sandhills.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor head offshore to the Marathon Hump, taking advantage of the 26-feet hybrid boat's versatility to find some exciting Blackfin and Skipjack Tuna fishing.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor are joined by scientist Nick Haddad, who educates our hosts and the fishing world on the various descending devices used to preserve stressed catch from deeper waters as the three of them get into some fun Red Snapper fishing off the coast of Marathon, Florida in the Keys.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience

programme.title: Asian Le Mans Series

programme.title: F1 Rubber Stamps GM’s F1 Entry
programme.desc: So, after several years of preparations, negotiations, public arguments, and even the US Department of Justice getting involved, Cadillac has finally been formally announced as Formula 1’s 11th team for the 2026 season! Today’s formal announcement confirms the handshake agreement that the sport had with General Motors last November. After a revised bid led by Dan Towriss of the TWG Group (Formerly Andretti) was accepted. The Silverstone-based project now has the green light to prepare for its first race in just 12 months as a customer team with Ferrari power units until General Motors builds its own version for 2028. Motorsport.Com’s Editor in Chief, Ben Hunt, reacts to this breaking news, with Laitta Chemelo, Editor at Motorsport.Com and Nascar Reporter at Motorsport.com, Nick DeGroot.

programme.title: WRC takes on the Temple of Speed - Monza Rally Show
programme.desc: The World Rally Championship signed off 2024 in style with one last blast around the Temple of Speed as the Monza Rally Show returned after a brief hiatus, to celebrate the season just gone and the end of Pirelli's association with the WRC. New world champion Thierry Neuville reflects on his championship year while Autosport’s Tom Howard learns first hand what it takes to tackle Monza famous banking with Hyundai WRC driver Dani Sordo.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The GLORY welterweight title will be on the line in the main event as the reigning & defending champion Endy Semeleer (35-1, 17 KO) welcomes the challenge of top contender Chico Kwasi (42-5, 22 KO). In the co-main event, after his crazy GLORY Heavyweight Grand Prix performance, the wild & exciting Bahram Rajabzadeh (66-2, 58 KO) steps down to light heavyweight and meets the hard-hitting Paris-based Kevin Oumar (33-4, 7 KO), a French kickboxing champion & budding MMA star. Belgian-Moroccan superstar Youssef Boughanem (187-43-8, 119 KO) steps into the GLORY ring for the very first time in his illustrious career as he meets the Ukraine’s Stanislav Kazantsev (25-8-1, 7 KO). The best of French kickboxing will be on display throughout the rest of the card as a host of the nation’s top stars will be in action against opponents from all over the world.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Endy Semeleer (35-1, 17 KO) will put his GLORY welterweight title on the line against ‘House of GLORY’ winner Anwar Ouled-Chaib (3-0) in the main event. In the co-main event, local fan favourite Nabil Khachab (26-4-1, 4 KO) finally gets his opportunity to enter the GLORY Grand Prix as he goes up against Serbia’s Nikola Filipovic (11-2, 6 KO) in a qualifying fight. Number one ranked Enriko Kehl (52-15-2, 30 KO) will be aiming undeniably book his spot as the next title challenger against champion Tyjani Beztati. The German meets the dangerous Arman Hambaryan (58-8-2, 27 KO) of Armenia.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: 3 wins to come out on top, who's it going to be? Rico Verhoeven, Levi Rigters, Tarik Osaro, Benjamin Adegbuyi, Sofian Laidouni, Uku Jurjendal, Bahram Rajabzadeh, and Nabil Khachab pair up and throw down for the GLORY Heavyweight Grand Prix, an 8-man 1-night heavyweight tournament for the ages.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The GLORY welterweight title will be on the line in the main event as the reigning & defending champion Endy Semeleer (35-1, 17 KO) welcomes the challenge of top contender Chico Kwasi (42-5, 22 KO). In the co-main event, after his crazy GLORY Heavyweight Grand Prix performance, the wild & exciting Bahram Rajabzadeh (66-2, 58 KO) steps down to light heavyweight and meets the hard-hitting Paris-based Kevin Oumar (33-4, 7 KO), a French kickboxing champion & budding MMA star. Belgian-Moroccan superstar Youssef Boughanem (187-43-8, 119 KO) steps into the GLORY ring for the very first time in his illustrious career as he meets the Ukraine’s Stanislav Kazantsev (25-8-1, 7 KO). The best of French kickboxing will be on display throughout the rest of the card as a host of the nation’s top stars will be in action against opponents from all over the world.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Donovan Wisse (20-1, 10 KO) puts his middleweight championship on the line against number one contender Ulric Bokeme (32-4, 17 KO) in the main event of the evening. Wisse is one of the top P4P kickboxers on the planet today and is chasing his fourth straight title defense. After his Grand Prix heroics, the number one ranked heavyweight Levi Rigters (17-2, 8 KO) returns to action to take on dangerous late notice replacement Nico Pereira Horta (22-8, 3 KO) in the co-main event. The ‘King of The Hague’ crown is up for grabs when rivals Michael Boapeah (16-4-1, 7 KO) and Serkan Ozcaglayan (45-9, 36 KO) clash. The two top middleweights meet in this local derby match-up where the winner walks away with bragging rights in a fight that is sure to split the arena.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The eight-man one-night GLORY Light Heavyweight Grand Prix will crown the baddest light heavyweight striker on the planet. The eight participants are: GLORY champion, #C Tarik Khbabez (58-10-1, 28 KO), Morocco. Former champion, #1 Donegi Abena (27-10, 7 KO), Suriname. Former champion, #2 Sergej Maslobojev (38-6, 23 KO), Lithuania. Undefeated in GLORY, #3 Stefan Latescu (17-2, 8 KO), Romania. ‘Mister Cool’ #4 Ibrahim El Bouni (41-9-1, 22 KO), Morocco. The wild & unpredictable, #5 Bahram Rajabzadeh (67-2, 59 KO), Azerbaijan. Top French light heavyweight, #6 Pascal Toure (20-6, 7 KO), France. Veteran fighter, #7 Bogdan Stoica (58-14, 40 KO), Romania.

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Robot Wars

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore the frigid Canadian arctic in the depths of winter. The team first uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head north through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George and three side-kicks head straight into the “Bearcage”, looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones that Texas and Oklahoma can throw at them. They find it – and their stormchasing vehicles don’t look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George's exploration of the undersea world begins on a submarine in Grand Caymon.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The “Angry Planet” team will be tracking storms through the 2009 Hurricane season, and plan to film george as he heads into a big one.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: For George Kourounis‚ ground zero for stormchasing is Oklahoma City, the capital of´Tornado Alley´.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: The Angry Planet team heads to Africa to climb the steep and very active Nyiragongo Volcano in the Congo that erupted in 2002, sending 125,000 people fleeing for their lives. Host/adventurer George Kourounis explores the bubbling lake of molten lava and investigates the risk the dangerous volcano poses to both the people of city of Goma and the Mountain Gorillas who live on the nearby jungle slopes.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.sub-title: Angry Planet | The Winds of Autumn
programme.desc: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Newport
programme.desc: Welcome to a legendary Ocean destination. With over 300 years of history and miles of coastal beauty, Newport, Rhode Island was once the vacation hotspot for the who’s who of the Gilded Age. Today, it’s still a vacation favorite with stunning architecture, rich history, and an incredible gastronomy scene. Join Samantha as she meets the people past and present who make Newport a Place to Love.

programme.title: Roadfood Adventures USA
programme.desc: Travel the South to find the most colorful roads in the nation and discover delicious food, magnificent scenery, magic moments, and fascinating people all along the way.

programme.title: Into America's Wild
programme.desc: Step off the beaten path and connect to your inner trailblazer in this cross-country journey to some of the most beautiful but little-known landscapes of North America. Into America’s Wild is a non-stop ride via kayak, train, bike, hot air balloon and more that explores the transformational allure of wild places and the human connection we all share with the natural world.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric treks the canyons and waters of Lake Powell, Utah on foot and via packraft.

programme.title: Epic Trails
programme.desc: Eric leaves the backcountry to discover urban hiking adventures in the cities of Los Angeles and San Francisco, California.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 1
programme.desc: Canadians Sophie and Anna go on a journey of discovery, luck and love in the Cradle of Liberty, Boston, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 2
programme.desc: Gabby and Jono try their luck in panoramic Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Lucky in Love Ep 3
programme.desc: Percy and Michelle go on a game of chance in the Emerald city of Seattle.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Colorado Springs, CO
programme.desc: When you’re surrounded by breathtaking mountain landscapes, it would be easy to rely on tradition and stay the same. However, this destination does the exact opposite. Whether it’s creating a state-of-the-art museum to honor the United States' greatest athletes, modernizing its natural attractions so they’re accessible to all, or creating a community that invites success, there’s excitement in the air for what is new and innovative. See why Colorado Springs, Colorado is a Place to Love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Maine's Coastline
programme.desc: Few places compare to coastal Maine’s wild beauty. It’s where mountains meet the ocean, marine animals have island retreats, and the air comes perfectly salted. It’s known as summer vacationland with a coastline that stretches over 3,400 miles, punctuated with lighthouses, schooners, and fabulous lobster shacks. Throw in a foggy sunrise at Cadillac Mountain and boom—you’ll see why Maine has captured so many hearts. Here’s why Maine is a place to love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Brown Places to Love: St. Augustine, FL
programme.desc: In St. Augustine, Florida, wandering is encouraged and time is meant to be savored. It’s a historic powerhouse of a destination where local events not only shaped its history but an entire country’s. With an unexpected food scene, protected wetlands, and miles of beautiful beaches to explore, there’s a lot to sink your (shark) teeth into. Join Samantha as she explores America’s oldest city – St. Augustine, Florida.

programme.title: Fusion of Flavors
programme.desc: Guy digs into a variety of flavor fusions.

programme.title: Globe Tasting
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's getting an authentic taste from all around the globe, including Latin fusion in California, real-deal Thai in Phoenix, and Sicilian specialties in New Jersey.

programme.title: America's Musical Journey
programme.desc: A cross-country adventure through the musical heritage of America and the cultural cities where America's music was born.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.sub-title: American Beats: Sea Songs of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: Chunz and Makh embark on a fun-filled voyage through The Upper Peninsula of Michigan to experience the Sea Songs of the Great Lakes. Adventure is abound as they trek through lush forests, stunning waterfalls and even explore a historic shipwreck. Along the way, they meet folk legends Dan Truckey and Lee Murdock, who introduce them to the captivating world of sailors’ tunes. From Lake Ballads to Sea Shanties, their journey culminates at the treasured Hiawatha Folk Festival, where campfire songs and communal vibes celebrate the region's enduring charm.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Known as the quintessential party music, Polka is alive and evolving in the great city of Milwaukee. At the beloved festival of Germanfest, Polka Hall of Fame legend Peggy Mueller showcases her traditional roots while The November Criminals share their fusion of polka and hip-hop, making it clear there is something for everyone. From buttonboxes to beers and brats, this is a city full of personality and a deep love for its musical heritage.

programme.title: American Beats
programme.desc: Chunz and Makh visit Lafayette, Louisiana where they take a deep dive into Zydeco music and local crawfish with Grammy-winning musician Chubby.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: For this episode, Ben’s planned an EPIC 48 hours in Utah, starting in Salt Lake City before venturing down to Zion National Park - but what will the other guys make of his itinerary?

programme.title: United Dates of America
programme.desc: Ruairi, Hardeep, and Luke head south to meet local singles in young and vibrant Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: United Dates of America
programme.desc: Ruairi, Hardeep, and Luke try their luck dating in artsy Providence, Rhode Island.

programme.title: United Dates of America
programme.desc: Ruairi, Hardeep, and Luke set out to meet local singles in outdoorsy Denver, Colorado.

programme.title: Samantha Brown Places to Love: Brooklyn
programme.desc: When you think New York City, you probably envision Manhattan. Yet a lot of the city’s heart and soul resides in Brooklyn. As one of the five boroughs in the USA’s largest city, Brooklyn is actually quite huge. But don’t let the size alarm you—this borough has a low-key, neighborhood vibe that’s devoid of the Manhattan hustle. Add in diverse neighborhoods, great food and unexpected businesses, and Brooklyn is a place to love.

programme.title: Something in the Water
programme.desc: Chronicles singer-songwriter Steve Azar's endeavor to record his album Down at the Liquor Store at the historic Club Ebony in Indianola, Mississippi with a group of storied musicians.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: In the middle of rural Maine, Paul and Nick create an outside barbeque for the family of John Mann, an eighth generation Ulster-Scot immigrant. The Manns are true frontier-people, and completely self sufficient from their land.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Chefs Paul Rankin and Nick Nairn are in Lexington, Virginia to cook for descendants of the Ulster-Scots Lewis family who settled in the area in the 18th century. Along the way they visit a heritage pig farmer, taste some sparkling cider and they discover some delicious goat’s cheese in the heart of Virginia’s Piedmont region where Paul has a close encounter with a friendly goat…

programme.title: Playgrounds
programme.desc: See some of the best playgrounds in the USA through the lens of athletes.

programme.title: USA Through Music
programme.desc: American cities have long played a starring role in its music. Notable musicians tell personal stories about how their favorite cities inspire their work.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern
programme.sub-title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern Chicago
programme.desc: Chicago is a city of both innovation and tradition. From immigrants cooking up classics to world-renowned chefs creating new concoctions with modern technology, Andrew gets a taste of Chicago's diverse food scene.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern
programme.sub-title: Bizarre Foods with Andrew Zimmern Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Andrew takes to the road to sample the Pennsylvania staples most people never hear about. A Japanese superstar chef cooks up poisonous sexual organs and a family boils up every part of the pig.

programme.title: Wild Travels
programme.sub-title: Spruce Goose - The Peculiarium - Marv's Farm Toys - Beer Can House - Classical Gas
programme.desc: Will stares in amazement at the largest airplane ever built - Howard Hughes' "Spruce Goose" in McMinnville, Oregon; samples all things strange at Portland's Peculiarium; marvels at Marv's incredible collection of Farm Toys in Monroe; admires the aluminum siding at Houston's Beer Can House and then pulls over for gas station memorabilia at Classical Gas in Embudo, New Mexico. Fill 'er up!

programme.title: Wild Travels
programme.sub-title: Ben & Jerry’s Flavor Graveyard - Mermaid Show - Cog Railray - Sneaker Convention - Bug Art Collection
programme.desc: Will finds himself in the middle of an ice cream catastrophe at Ben & Jerry’s Factory in Waterbury, Vermont; mingles with mermaids at the underwater show in Weeki Wachee, Florida; achieves speeds of 5 miles per hour on the cog wheel train to the summit of Mt. Washington, New Hampshire; buys new kicks at a Sneaker convention in Cleveland; and marvels at Bug Art portraits at a museum in St. Johnsbury, Vermont.

programme.title: Roadfood Adventures USA
programme.desc: Travel along the West to some of the most colorful roads, delicious food, magnificent scenery, magic moments, and fascinating people all along the way.

programme.title: National Parks Adventure
programme.desc: A team of modern day explorers take an off-trail adventure through the national parks of the USA, showing the awe-inspiring beauty found within America’s most legendary outdoor playgrounds.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love

programme.title: Adventure Cities

programme.desc: The guys find a different side of New Orleans.

programme.desc: Sorted hits up the Iowa State Fair and attempts to complete an insane foodie challenge.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Chattanooga
programme.desc: Located along the Tennessee River at the foothills of the Appalachian Mountains, Chattanooga, Tennessee, is the perfect blend of city and country. Over the last century, it has constantly found ways to reinvent and revitalize itself while still respecting its natural surroundings. Whether you’re wandering along its riverwalk, visiting one of its award-winning museums, finding unique ways to take in the views, or indulging in its generous culinary scene, join Samantha as she explores what makes Chattanooga a Place to Love.

programme.title: Samantha Brown Places to Love: Brooklyn
programme.desc: When you think New York City, you probably envision Manhattan. Yet a lot of the city’s heart and soul resides in Brooklyn. But don’t let the size alarm you—this borough has a low-key, neighborhood vibe that’s devoid of the Manhattan hustle. Add in diverse neighborhoods, great food and unexpected businesses, and Brooklyn is a place to love.

programme.title: Samantha Browns Places to Love
programme.sub-title: Samantha Browns Places To Love: Portland
programme.desc: Welcome to a city that has pioneered self-expression! Between its proximity to the great outdoors and its culture of creativity, this urban hub has influenced an entire nation on trends in everything from food to design all the while encouraging its residents to embrace their individuality. Join Samantha as she meets the people that make Portland, Oregon a Place to Love.
