programme.title: Inside Cream
programme.desc: The first of the super groups, what made Cream such a success

programme.title: Pink Floyd, The Wall
programme.desc: It is now over 25 years since the launch of The Wall, Pink Floyd’s magnum opus. Conceived by Roger Waters as an ambitious double album, a spectacular live show and a ground breaking feature film.

programme.title: Iron Maiden, Men Behind the Mask
programme.desc: Maiden members Paul Di'Annio and Dennis Stratton give the inside scoop on the carnage wreaked behind the scenes.

programme.title: Red Hot Chili Peppers, Phenomenon
programme.desc: This is the powerful independent critical review of the Red Hot Chili Peppers on record, on stage and on film. Drawing on live performance footage drawn from Woodstock and Red Square.

programme.title: The Rolling Stones In Performance
programme.desc: With the best of the onstage footage from the last 30 years, Bob Harris serves up a rare archive interview with Jagger and Brian Jones.

programme.title: Madonna Music in Review
programme.desc: This is the most frank, candid and penetrating retrospective on a career which has defied all the odds and every changing fashion.

programme.title: The Beatles Phenomenon
programme.desc: This exclusive film brings new, fresh and a different insight into the Beatles phenomenon.

programme.title: Elvis The Later Years
programme.desc: Featuring live concert footage from Hawaii in 1973, alongside the first hand reflections of those who knew and worked with The King personally.

programme.title: Queen, Rock Case Studies
programme.desc: The triumphs and the tragedies: Rock Case Studies is a complete review of all Queen’s albums from their self-titled debut to Innuendo.

programme.title: Abba Thank You For the Music
programme.desc: Abba on Stage, S.O.S., Dancing Queen and more

programme.title: Led Zeppelin, Reflections
programme.desc: This unique film review draws on rare documentary footage of Led Zeppelin in performance and on tour in Australia during 1972 alongside the candid reflections of the band.

programme.title: King Crimson - Inside
programme.desc: The independent critical review of King Crimson with John Wetton, Bill Bruford, and Robert Fripp

programme.title: Deep Purple, In Rock
programme.desc: In Rock was the first studio album from the Mark II line up of Deep Purple, and with Ritchie Blackmore firmly in the driving seat, backed up by Gillan’s intense vocals.

programme.title: The Kinks -In Performance
programme.desc: Leading the British invasion of America, The Kinks in Performance presented by Linda Serck.

programme.title: Coldplay - Music in Review
programme.desc: Review of Coldplay's early career including lots of footage of the band performing their hits - presented by Mary Anne Hobbs.

programme.title: Elvis Presley, Up Close and Personal
programme.desc: This unique film review draws on rare concert archive film of Elvis Presley in performance and documentary footage from television and radio archives around the world.

programme.title: The Doors The Halcyon Years Pt 1
programme.desc: Drawing on rare film and television footage, this independent and highly authoritative review critically reassesses the work of this legendary band from the ’67 debut album right through to L.A. ...

programme.title: Slade Total Rock Review
programme.desc: This is the long awaited independent critical review of the music produced by Slade during the glory years with Noddy Holder at the microphone.

programme.title: Van Der Graff Generator TRR
programme.desc: The long awaited review of the music of this prog rock band

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Smithy's party has proven to be entertaining and everyone is enjoying themselves. Meanwhile, during the festivities, Bludgy, the city's most notorious thief is seen sneaking upstairs, drawing the attention of others. Finn and Hogar's mission hangs in the balance...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Finn and Hogar are tied up below Smithy's tavern along with a few others. Bludgy is about to sell off the crystal rod for a life changing amount ofgold, while Arkie is "retrieving" something important from his workshop.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party, now in possession of the CRYSTAL ROD, has fled from the thieves in the Sunken City through the underground tunnels. Once outside, they discover the Queen's forces are invading from the sea, bombarding the city. They quickly slip out beyond the walls, north of the city... but to go where?

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party has been caught trying to escape and with them, the Artifact. Eventually they wake up shackled to a cart, and surrounded by guards on their way back into the occupied Sunken City… at the mercy of the Queen's Forces.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: "The party has adjusted to their new lives the best ways they know, how but they are eager to escape. - - Follow the party as they continue working their 9 to 5 jobs with only one lunch break and four 15 minute coffee breaks fun by the evil Queen’s forces."

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: "The Party is in action, and so is the party. Our would be heroes are posing as entertainment to get aboard the rooks ship and steal back the rod before they can escape. - - Will they succeed?"

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: "Our Party, aka Blackwater Bandits, have earned their name stealing back the rod from the Rook. Now its time for one more performance... the disappearing act. - - Will they succeed in this mid-season finale?"

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The Players awake with no memories and must quickly work together to navigate a dangerous dungeon. The extra twist? They have no idea they are playing their actual characters!

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party has passed the trial! With acceptance into the city of Anwar, their new goal is recovering those stolen memories...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Tragedy has struck the party, a member has fallen. Adding to their strife, they now find themselves in yet another tough situation below Anwar.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Hurtling down the water passageway on the journey to The Dark, the party's boat takes a beating. Luckily for them, this means their captor The Lovely Lute takes a beating as well. Now they must try to continue their mission for the Crystal Rod.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.sub-title: The Short Adventures of Thistle & Arky
programme.desc: Who better to go poking around in goblin tunnels than the only members of the party who will fit inside?! But what Arky and Thistle find in the warrens is not what they expected…

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The party finds the dwarven city of Iron Stone. Unfortunately, it is under siege by strange magical creatures. And what has become of that dangerous assassin, the Lovely Lute?

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Coming upon the lava-fueled dwarven forge, the party begins to craft anti-magical emerald-imbued weapons. That is, until the whole building begins to shake...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Iron Stone is saved! As thanks, the party receives a bounty of magical crystals and a powerful new iron suit for Arky. Now they head for Rock Bottom, a duegar dwarf city beneath a waterfall in the dark Underground.

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Reaching Pelion Darrus, the Party finds it under devastating attack from above and below. One hero makes an unexpected journey, dragging the party into a surprising decision in this weeks episode!

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: The Audio Dungeon crew begin their adventure in the world of Andaria. Finndelar (Tom) the wizard, and Hogar (Dan) the ranger, have just finished their two month journey, and have reached their destination; The Sunken City. Finn's mission is to retrieve a magical device created in part by a local craftsman: Arkie Fint. Hogar, an ally of Finn, was hired to guide and protect him. When they arrive, they find themselves in the midst of a large celebration, as well as a mystery regarding their mission...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Finndelar (Tom) and Hogar (Dan) have arrived in the Sunken City and are now searching for the magical device they have journeyed so far for. After meeting the craftsman Arkie Fint, they travel to Smithy's tavern in hope of finding a clue to their mystery...

programme.title: The Celestial Wars
programme.desc: Smithy's party has proven to be entertaining and everyone is enjoying themselves. Meanwhile, during the festivities, Bludgy, the city's most notorious thief is seen sneaking upstairs, drawing the attention of others. Finn and Hogar's mission hangs in the balance...

programme.desc: A widowed and out of work father reluctantly sends his daughter to stay with her aunt in a town that has outlawed dogs. She now has to get to the bottom of what is happening to all the dogs and at the same time charm the mayor with a pageant.

programme.title: Crash Course: Biology

programme.title: It's Quieter in the Twilight

programme.title: What If: Discussed
programme.sub-title: Have We Already Made First Contact?
programme.desc: For over half a century, we've searched for radio signals from extraterrestrial civilizations. Are they ignoring us? Or have aliens already made contact without us knowing it?

programme.title: What If: Chase Dies in Space

programme.title: After Antarctica
programme.desc: After Antarctica follows polar explorer Will Steger’s journey as an eyewitness to the greatest changes to the polar regions of our planet.

programme.title: The Last Man on the Moon

programme.title: After Antarctica

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: TI 11 does not have anything on Team Liquid
programme.desc: Welcome to the next chapter of Team Liquid’s legendary TI 11 run! Experience the intense preparation and gameplay as they give their all in what may be their final tournament. See the heart and soul they pour into every moment, on and off the keyboard.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome back to *Two People Talking*! Join Disguised Toast and World of Warcraft Race to World First Champion Maximum WOW. They’ll discuss the race, the dedication it required, and other fun topics, including Maximum's beloved dogs. Tune in for an engaging conversation!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Bigger isn't always better! Watch our Dota 2 team tackle a 1 vs. 1 challenge using the world’s largest keyboard and mouse—a 14:1 scale Alienware AW420K and AW720M. See their performance and then join us in Time Lapse to witness Team Liquid break Secret's dominance and get a behind-the-scenes look at what goes into such a major game!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Backseat Gaming: League of Legends Edition
programme.desc: Welcome to Backseat Gaming! Join Kobe, Broxah, and Bwipo as they give live feedback while Kobe tries to find his rhythm. Then, watch CoreJJ and Yeon play League of Legends with one controlling the mouse and the other the keyboard.

programme.title: Coaching Noobs!
programme.desc: Today, watch as Bwipo attempts to coach a League newbie, transforming them into a capable player—can he handle the challenge? Then, see if three pro League players can take down an entire team of Gold players. Tune in to find out who prevails!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Kick off the LCS Summer split with the Team Liquid x Bud Light Tailgate! Join Academy Coach Spawn, IzPanduhh, and DanielKennedyDK as they preview League of Legends teams and make their predictions. Do you agree? Tune in to see!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Hot Juans: hopefully I am not fired
programme.desc: We love hot wings too much! Welcome back to Hot Juans, where we don't mind the inspiration. Today, join our CEO Liquid112 and Hungrybox as they brave spicy wings. Get an inside look at what it’s like to run a major eSports organization like Team Liquid, and see how our CEO handles the heat—literally and figuratively!

programme.title: The Only Time NA Succeeded
programme.desc: North America rarely shines in international League of Legends, but there was one moment they held their own! Relive this rare success, then check out “The Chosen,” our trailer for the epic Six Invitational, one of Rainbow Six Siege’s biggest tournaments.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Survival ep.1: Team Liquid takes on the biggest PUBG tournament of the year
programme.desc: Can Team Liquid PUBG handle the biggest tournament ever? Watch "Survival" for a deep dive into one of the world’s largest PUBG events. Follow the team’s journey and see Jeemz share highlights and lowlights from the tournament's start!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: We’re back with *Two People Talking*! Disguised Toast is joined by Chef Triciaisabirdy, known for her cooking shows and tutorials on Twitch. Watch as they discuss cooking techniques, share Twitch funny moments, and even give her mom a call!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Change with the meta or fall to the wayside
programme.desc: "Prepare for the evolving World of Warcraft meta! In today’s episode, explore Dragonflight’s new Evoker class, see how new pets might impact the game, and get a behind-the-scenes look at upcoming huge damage buffs. Don’t miss out!"

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: The Ultimate World of Warcraft Boss Guide Part. 1
programme.desc: We’re diving back into Team Liquid World of Warcraft! Today’s guides cover the latest bosses, starting with Smolderon on Heroic and Normal. We’ll also cover Nymue, Larodar, Council of Dreams, Volcross, and Igira, with tips for both difficulties.

programme.title: Learning League 101
programme.desc: In today’s episode, Valorant pros open up by answering the web’s most searched questions, giving fans a glimpse into their lives beyond the game. Then, dive into our beginner’s guide to League of Legends, perfect for anyone looking to understand the basics and enjoy the action!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: We’ll always cherish Zai! This episode revisits his standout TI performances and offers a behind-the-scenes look at our Dota team's preparation. See their highs and lows, focus strategies, and the intense scrimmages leading up to TI.

programme.title: WOW: World's Firsts
programme.desc: Team Liquid’s Guild returns to Aberrus, the Shadowed Crucible, aiming for World’s Firsts against mythic bosses. They begin with Mythic Rashok, then face Mythic Zskarn, followed by Mythic Magmorax, and conclude with a World’s First attempt on Mythic Echo of Neltharion.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Hot Juans: MKLeo will not be stopped
programme.desc: Introducing *Hot Juans*, the show inspired by another but with our own twist! We're not stopping until Hungrybox gets his invite. Today, we’re thrilled to have the world’s #1 Super Smash Bros. player, MKLeo, with us. Discover the man behind the legend as he tackles fiery wings and tough questions. Will he handle the heat and the grilling? Tune in to find out!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Squad: Five playoff Series, three worlds seeds, and a penta
programme.desc: Welcome back to Squad! Watch the final League Championship Series Summer split push and the team’s international journey. Get an inside look at game prep, player emotions, and more. With 5 series, 3 Worlds seeds, and one penta, it’s a must-watch!

programme.title: Never Give Jensen Orianna
programme.desc: League of Legends demands smart champion selection. We explore why Jensen shouldn’t play Orianna, then join Pyosik & Team Liquid as they watch the Swiss Drawings to find out their next opponents.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Coaching Noobs: League of Legends Edition
programme.desc: Ever wondered what it’s like to be coached by a pro? Watch Bwipo guide a League of Legends newbie with tips and tricks you might have missed. Then, see if staff member Kold can handle the pressure as he faces off against pro player Santorin.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Time Lapse is back with a new episode! Join Zai and Blitz as they revisit the epic EG vs EHOME match from TI6. Watch them relive legendary plays, laugh at old mistakes, and dive into this classic Dota 2 showdown.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome to Pro League! Go behind the scenes with our Counter-Strike stars NAF and oSee to see how they prepare for matches and learn more about them. Watch their top-tier gameplay and then enjoy as Yekindar and oSee coach amateur teams in competitive CS. Who will win? Tune in to find out!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Time Winder: SKT T1 Finally Loses!
programme.desc: Welcome back to Team Liquid’s Time Winder, sponsored by SAP! Today, we revisit the historic match where the first team ever defeated SKT T1, ending their seemingly unstoppable run. Tune in for behind-the-scenes insights into the players' feelings during that unforgettable game

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Hot Juans: PaladinAmber destroys some vegan wings
programme.desc: This is literally the hottest set of wings we’ve made yet—and they’re vegan! Welcome to Hot Juans, where we don’t mind the inspiration. Join us with top streamer PaladinAmber as she faces these scorching vegan wings. Will she handle the heat, both figuratively and literally? Tune in to find out!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Learn from the best: League of Legends Edition
programme.desc: Want to level up quickly in League of Legends? Join Team Liquid’s League of Legends squad as they share essential tips and tricks to improve fast. Go beyond the basics with insights into various aspects of the game and boost your skills efficiently!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Watch Team Liquid players analyze their old match against Cloud9. Gain insights into their strategies, learn from their reflections, and see their thought process during intense moments.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: Time to learn from our mistakes
programme.desc: Join Team Liquid as we revisit a tough loss from our first LCS match. Watch our players analyze mistakes, learn, and prepare for the next opportunity. Our dedication to improvement shows that there's always room for growth, no matter your skill level.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: In this episode of Squad, follow the team’s journey to South Korea for Worlds. Experience the thrill of being an underdog, uncover the off-screen skills needed for top-level play, and go behind the scenes of their rollercoaster tournament experience.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: League of Legends: Casting Vs. Playing
programme.desc: Welcome! Catch up with Huni and Reignover as they reflect on their time playing together. Explore the casting world versus being a player, and don’t miss the thrilling rematch between Team Liquid and T1. It’s an episode you’ll want to see!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.desc: Welcome back to Timelapse! This episode explores the origins of Polish superstar Nisha, featuring old clips that highlight his standout moments and why we recruited him. Also, revisit some of Team Liquid's top games against Nisha before he joined us full-time.

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: World of Warcraft Mythic Guides Part. 1

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: World of Warcraft Mythic Guides Part. 2

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: World of Warcraft: Race for World's First

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: World of Warcraft: Race for World's First Mythics

Don’t miss this thrilling episode featuring two World’s Firsts in one go—it's pure insanity!

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled

programme.title: Team Liquid: A Legacy Unrivaled
programme.sub-title: The only time North America Succeeded
programme.desc: North American League of Legends shines in this episode! We explore Team Liquid’s standout 2019 MSI Semi-Finals match against IG and its impact. Plus, watch Neeko’s Jungle Hide & Seek against 100T Tenacity—find out if it’s a success or a bust!

programme.title: Cluster
programme.desc: This is our bookmark. Our full stop. It is an actual document of individuality and modern surfing and living and romping and laughing. Collect it and recollect on it. Here we are now, entertain us. And well take it from there.

programme.title: Spinning at the Speed of Now
programme.desc: This original surfing film shines a spotlight on Filipe Toledo as he travels to Panama, Costa Rica, Australia, and Indonesia with other surfers.

programme.title: Isolated
programme.desc: Five world class surfers travel to New Guinea in search of undiscovered waves, but end up discovering so much more.

programme.title: Nervous Laughter
programme.desc: Nervous Laughter follows Maui's best surfers as they take on the island's giant wave, Jaws, and shatter expectations of what's possible in big wave surfing.

programme.title: Tropically Yours
programme.desc: Escape the congested lineups of today’s popular surf destinations, and discover the best kept secrets in the surfing world. New exotic locales still exist, and Tropically Yours is your link to unspoiled perfection. Pack your bags, turn off your phone, and sink your feet into some warm, soft sand. Paradise awaits with welcoming arms.

programme.title: Andy Irons and The Radicals
programme.desc: This is a film about Andy Irons surfing life, the progressive pioneers who influenced him, the prodigious teenage peers who pushed him, and how his surfing has inspired a generation since.

programme.title: Big Wave Tow-In Invitational
programme.desc: Five of the world's most prolific big wave riders charge 30-foot waves at the center of the big wave universe.

programme.title: Ground Swell: Epic Stories of Monster Waves
programme.desc: Showcasing the most famous big wave spots on the planet and the surfers who tackled them.

programme.title: Ground Swell: Other Side of Fear
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the 2021-22 big wave season through the eyes of legendary surfers.

programme.title: Go Easy on the Zambezi
programme.desc: Take It Easy On The Zambezi, featuring Mikey February, Dylan Graves, and Harry Bryant, on what Graves calls the biggest adventure he's ever taken in search of surf, deep into the heart of Sub-Saharan Africa.

programme.title: Peel: The Peru Project
programme.desc: Wes Brown and TJ Barrack take their film crew to the rugged deserts and jungles in Peru with some of the world's best surfers.

programme.title: Winter Out West
programme.desc: Famed water cinematographer Tom “Jenno” Jennings takes to the Western Australia’s rugged coastline to capture breathtaking surfing footage.

programme.title: Heavy Water
programme.desc: Heavy Water is a Michael Oblowitz film, produced by Red Bull Media House and All Edge Entertainment, that follows the life and times of Nathan Fletcher, part of the royal family of surfing and a key figure in big wave history.

programme.title: Noah: The Art of Surfing
programme.desc: Professional surfer Noah Beschen travels to Western Australia and Tahiti alongside filmmaker Andy Woodward to surf beautiful yet powerful waves before returning home to the North Shore of Oahu.

programme.title: Step into Liquid
programme.desc: Zigzagging from the waters off Ireland to Oahu's ripping North Shore, this documentary profiles the diverse and fascinating characters who have devoted their lives to catching the perfect wave.

programme.title: PAIGE
programme.desc: A closer look into the life of Paige Alms, one of the best big wave surfers in the world, as she trains mentally and physically for the 2017 Pe'ahi Challenge (Jaws) on Maui, conquering 40-50 foot waves, and inspiring the next generation.

programme.title: Archy: Built for Speed, Born to Ride
programme.desc: Archys story is one of survival through surf stardom at an early age, fame, drugs, alcohol, sponsorships and the surf rock star lifestyle. Compelling interviews, and explosive surf action from the 80s, 90s, 2000s and beyond.

programme.title: Peel: The Peru Project
programme.desc: Wes Brown and TJ Barrack take their film crew to the rugged deserts and jungles in Peru with some of the world's best surfers.

programme.title: Havana Libre
programme.desc: After years of surfing being illegal, a diehard group of Cuban surfers fight to legitimize their passion. Havana Libre chronicles their fight in the face of political oppression, confronting borders and outdated ideologies along the way.

programme.title: River Cottage Australia: Blackberry and Pork
programme.desc: River Cottage Australia land-holder Paul West is keen to restore the gully which acts as a natural watercourse on his farm - but it's almost totally overgrown with blackberries.

programme.title: River Cottage Australia: Water Shortage
programme.desc: With a malfunctioning water tank, and no dams to rely on, Paul is suddenly faced with a farmer's worst fear - a critical shortage of water.

programme.title: River Cottage Australia: Seafood and Pigs
programme.desc: With his cows, chooks and veggies thriving, Paul decides it's time to explore the nearby coastline and he discovers an abundant source of seafood delicacies.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Spaghetti Straps - Fringe on Felted Wool - Embroidery on Faux Leather
programme.desc: Learn how to make spaghetti straps, fringe on felted wool and create beautifully cool embroidery on faux leather!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Topstitching and Changing Pocket Angles
programme.desc: Update your wardrobe! Learn how to topstitch and change pocket angles.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Self Fabric Belt - Cutting Buttonholes - Perfect Hems - Flat Felted Seams
programme.desc: Learn how to make fabric belts, perfect hems, and flat felted seams! And a bonus - your guide into cutting buttonholes.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Serging Knits
programme.desc: Angela Wolf demonstrates serging knits.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Refashion with Lace Inserts
programme.desc: Angela Wolf refashions with lace inserts.

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Turn a Sports Bra to a Tank Top
programme.desc: Lean how to turn your sports bra to a tank top!

programme.title: It's Sew Easy: Tank Top Lace Trim
programme.desc: Learn how to make a comfortable tank top with Angela!

programme.title: Fabric to Fashion Episode 2
programme.desc: Fabric to Fashion is a reality show featuring designers and sewist from all over the world. Designers are given a challenge, then we follow the guests designing in their own sewing spaces. Angela Wolf mentors and guides the designers throughout each challenge, and often throws in a few extra twists!

programme.title: An Introduction to Tarot
programme.desc: Explore the mysteries and attraction of the ancient art of Tarot Cards. The cards might be centuries old but can still have an inexplicable power to help answer some of life's most important questions. In this programme we explain how to use the cards, shows the basic meaning of the pack and how to conduct a Tarot card reading. We conduct a reading and we can see for ourselves how to explain the possible card interpretations.

programme.title: The Fruit Hunters
programme.desc: The Fruit Hunters travels across culture, history and geography to show how intertwined we are with the fruits we eat. The ranks of the fruit-obsessed include adventurers, scientists, fruit detectives and even movie star Bill Pullman, fruit hunters dedicating themselves to searching for and saving rare and exotic fruit, and to creating a Garden of Eden in a world increasingly dominated by industrialized monoculture.

programme.title: Moogly: Corner to Corner
programme.desc: Learn about corner to corner crochet

programme.title: Moogly: Let's Chat Crochet
programme.desc: Let's talk about the crochet world

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Teeny Tiny Quilt
programme.desc: Lean with Beth how to create a beautiful teeny tiny quilt for fall or Halloween.

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Simple Unconventional Heavy Quilt
programme.desc: Make a heavier quilt using a blanket as batting. learn some unconventional quilting ideas!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Adding Colorful Binding to a Quilt
programme.desc: Binding 101- how to bind a quilt.

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Adding Saching and Cornerstones to a Quilt
programme.desc: Learn how to add sashing and cornerstones with Beth!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Cross Hatching Quilting
programme.desc: Beth is finishing up her cross hatch quilt!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Drunkard's Path Quilt
programme.desc: Learn "Drunkard’s Path" quilt block with Beth! Make your own template of any size!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Quilting Vintage Stars
programme.desc: Make some pretty vintage looking stars with Beth today!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Quilting Spring Table Topper
programme.desc: Make a spring table topper with two beautiful quilt blocks along with Beth!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Quilting a Bag
programme.desc: Sew an awesome bag with Beth! No worries, it's simple!

programme.title: Quilting with Beth: Off Kilter & Solid Blue Quilt
programme.desc: Lean an easiest way to grow a quilt with Beth. Double the size in no time!

programme.title: Pure Design: Lee & Stevie's Living/Dining Room
programme.desc: Creating a living space that works for both kids and adults shouldn't mean you have to compromise on grown-up style. By using natural fibers and turning tired items into fabulous new centerpieces, Samantha Pynn transforms a living/dining room from a playroom into a glamorous living space that's sophisticated enough for a busy working mom yet playful enough for her young daughter.

programme.title: Pure Design: Kristen & Dave's Main Floor
programme.desc: Marketing executives Kristen and Dave bought their modest first home a few years ago and undertook the much-needed renovations themselves. They did a great job removing walls and installing a new kitchen but then ran out of steam. Now they need designer Samantha Pynn's expertise to pull their open concept kitchen/dining/living room together and turn it into the beautiful modern space that they had originally envisioned.

programme.title: Pure Design: Helen & Niall's Nursery
programme.desc: Homeowners Helen and Niall are getting nervous - they're a few short months away from the birth of their first child and their never-renovated 1920s home doesn't contain a nursery. Both work full time - so they're relying on designer Samantha Pynn to create a bright and practical room for their new bundle of joy.

programme.title: Pure Design: Alexis & Adam's Kitchen
programme.desc: Alexis and Adam are in lifestyle shock: the arrival their son Hudson has meant that this formerly 'out and about' couple is now decidedly housebound but their 1980s kitchen just isn't happening anymore. It's neither practical nor beautiful so designer Samantha Pynn gives it an eco-friendly and stylish makeover. By taking out the dated metallic back-splash, lacquering their cabinets and updating the furnishings, Samantha converts an open kitchen and living area into a stunning space that is both functional for everyday use and glamorous enough for entertaining.

programme.title: Pure Design: Claudia & Justin's Living/Dining Room
programme.desc: Claudia and Justin are professional foodies - he's a chef and she's a food stylist. So it's no surprise that their urban loft space has a beautifully designed modern kitchen. Only problem is, the rest of the space doesn't measure up: it's a mishmash of Danish modern with other inherited and found pieces. Designer Samantha Pynn uses their showpiece kitchen as an inspiration and by recovering older teak pieces with eco-friendly fabrics and redoing the floor plan.

programme.title: Pure Design: Virginia's Kitchen
programme.desc: The cottage-style charm that Virginia fell in love with when she bought her city home has lost its appeal. Designer Samantha Pynn takes it from outdated to 'Modern Country' - with an eco-twist.

programme.title: Pure Design: Tiffany's Bedroom
programme.desc: For many first-time homeowners, decorating - especially private spaces like the bedroom - is definitely last on the list. That's certainly the case for Tiffany, an up and coming PR executive. By refreshing some of Tiffany's vintage furniture and bringing in some modern pieces and sustainable choices, host Samantha Pynn takes Tiffany's dorm-like bedroom with its mish-mash of furnishings and transforms it into an eclectic and soothing space, full of the sophistication a professional woman deserves.

programme.title: Essence of India: Global Influences On Indian Food
programme.desc: In this episode, between elephant rides and a lovely lesson from musicians, we squeeze in a few incredible cuisines, and give you some truly authentic, delectable, mouth-watering recipes.

programme.title: Great British Baking
programme.desc: Baking has been practised for thousands of years. As well as being a domestic practise it is now a huge commercial industry with celebrity chefs and programmes dedicated to baking! Learn the most basic step by step bread and cake recipes and then move on to more advance techiniques to make delicious cakes, plus biscuits and desserts. Recipes featured include Cinnamon Rolls, Lemon Cream Cheesecake, Pailted Poppy Seed Loaf, Caramel Slices, Bakewell Tart and Sticky Ginger Cake

programme.title: Malcolm X: AN OVERWHELMING INFLUENCE ON THE BLACK POWER MOVEMENT

Concurrently, viewers get to know Malcolm X, the man, through personal accounts with friends, co-workers and family members along with engaging photos and footage.

programme.title: Stiff
programme.desc: Tholang has been working as an undertaker in Soweto for as long as anyone can remember. HeÔÇÖs great with death, but not particularly good with life. Things go awry when his niece arrives to apprentice under him and manages to lose the corpse of an important politician.

programme.title: HAIR THAT MOVES
programme.desc: Upon entering a singing competition to pay for her travels to school, a 10-year old girl tries all she can to get her short, afro to wave in the wind like her favorite pop star's hair.

programme.title: La Source
programme.desc: Narrated by Oscar-nominated actor Don Cheadle (Hotel Rwanda, Crash), La Source tells the uplifting story of Josue Lajuenesse, a Haitian Princeton janitor who returns to his country after the devastating 2010 earthquake to revive his lifelong dream to bring what is most fundamental to his village's survival; clean water.

programme.desc: Mirai Scott, a civil rights attorney in Chicago, defends her estranged father, a former Black Panther, against a 30-year-old attempted murder charge. Long-held hostilities and accusations explode as Mirai aggressively pursues her fatherÔÇÖs defense.

programme.title: The Story of Lovers Rock
programme.desc: Lovers Rock, often dubbed ÔÇÿromantic reggaeÔÇÖ is a uniquely black British sound that developed in the late 70s and 80s to house parties, club and sound systems. Lovers Rock developed into a successful sound with national UK hits (Silly Games/Janet Kay) and was influential to British bands (Police, Culture Club, UB40)

programme.title: THE ART OF AMA ATA AIDOO
programme.desc: The Art of Ama Ata Aidoo explores the artistic contribution of one of AfricaÔÇÖs foremost women writers. The film charts AidooÔÇÖs creative journey over seven decades and celebrates the acclaimed Pan-African feminist, poet, playwright and novelist and provides a fascinating insight into her life.

programme.desc: This week, Mitchell, d00gs, Hoagie, and Kevin Boilard break down: Maryland vs. Notre Dame – Was this a one-off, or are the Terps THE team to beat? Talking WLL, Japan trip, and the future of women's lacrosse! Mitch’s Mailbox – Fan voicemails, hot takes, and DEBATES you won’t want to miss!

programme.desc: Martha reimagines five classic sandwich recipes: roasted chicken club, po'boy, muffuletta, breakfast egg sandwich, and the Reuben

programme.desc: Martha recreates four French bistro recipes you can make at home: lamb navarin, nicoise salad, croque-monsieur, and celery-root remoulade

programme.sub-title: One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha and her niece Sophie visit their favorite tea shop, Arogya, in Westport, Conn., to discover the do's and don'ts of making tea; they return to Martha's kitchen to create dishes with tea.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha visits Mast Market in Mt. Kisco, N.Y., and learns the art behind making their renowned chocolate; from roasting cacao, to stone grinding, to forming delicious bars and chips.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha shares techniques for making the perfect burgers; Pat LaFrieda joins Martha to grind his beef mix; Thomas Joseph joins to make a hake fish burger and Martha shares her turkey burger.

programme.desc: Welcome to Martha's passion project - the maze on her Bedford farm. Learn how to properly plant trees including measuring, fertilizing, and watering. Plus, how to start trees from seedlings.

programme.desc: Martha celebrates all things conifers, the cone-bearing trees that are typically evergreens. Go inside the Christmas tree farm on her Bedford farm and learn how to properly move an established tree.

programme.desc: Join Emeril and his friend Bau Nguyen in the kitchen as Emeril draws inspiration from Vietnamese cuisine to create Viet-Style Curried Shrimp with Cellophane Noodles and Beef Brisket Pho in a slow cooker.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Join Emeril and his friend Gabrielle Deculus in celebrating creole culture with Chicken Sauce Piquante and Creamy Grits and Grillades.

programme.title: Emeril Live
programme.desc: Oysters Casino; Fried Clams with Blue Cheese Dip; Thai Mussels with Squash; Seafood Stew with Sausage

programme.title: Emeril Live
programme.desc: Smoked Lobster and Mirliton Parfait, Fresh Swordfish with Olive Tomato Sauce and Crispy Calamari, Tequila Mussels

programme.title: Emeril Live
programme.desc: Smoked Beef and Onion Risotto, Pork Chops Stuffed with Oyster Dressing, Andouille Hollandaise and Smothered Greens, Shrimp Cakes with Roasted Remoulade and Sweet Potato Nests

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: Emeril hosts culinary students from his alma mater, Johnson & Wales University: how to make chicken and smoked sausage gumbo. Plus, how to make a roux and perfect white rice

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: Emeril takes you on a trip to Spain as he shares his favorite meals: salt-crusted branzino seasoned with citrus, grilled calamari, and seafood paella

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: Any time of year is a great time for a cookout! Join Emeril for grilled rack of lamb with mixed-herb pesto and a side of grilled potatoes with feta

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: Root for your home team with Emeril's sports party favorites: French dip sandwich, tuna poker chips, and the ultimate cheese dip - cheesy beer!

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: Emeril shows the most useful kitchen equipment: quick and easy stir-fried squid with chili sauce and sirloin steak fajitas

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: Emeril whips up diner favorites: chicken noodle soup, hot and cheesy fries (crispy fries smothered in rich gravy and topped with cheddar sauce) and "kicked-up" tuna melts

programme.title: Emeril's Table
programme.desc: A trip to a farmer's market inspired Emeril to present creamy turnip and parsnip soup. Plus, roasted chicken breasts with roasted acorn squash, braised pears, and pear cider reduction

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: Tennessee Titans superfans Isaiah Washington and Jameson Greer take Southern home cooking to new heights, with hot chicken thighs on buttermilk biscuits, sweet and tangy coleslaw, homemade pickles, and mini whiskey pecan pies.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: Denver superfan Catherine Highland, aka The Bronco Babe, grills up dishes to honor the great state of Colorado, including blue cheese-stuffed bison sliders with bacon drunken onions, angels on horseback, and grilled oysters on the half shell.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: Buffalo Bills superfan Lindsey Kszos takes inspiration from her city's famous wings with chile-glazed duck wings served with blue cheese creme fraiche, shaved celery and grape salad, and Buffalo chicken and white bean chili.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: Cleveland Browns superfan Ray Prisby joins, as Emeril cooks up Ohio-inspired dishes with his signature flare, including crawfish pierogies with lemony brown butter and tarragon, catfish fingers with homemade tartar sauce, and fried hush puppies.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Join Emeril as he shows New Orleans Saints player Juwan Johnson and his wife Chanen how to prepare a classic Big Easy dinner.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
